name: American Defense News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeurdrvpiqjor984erikt8dov5qro7ot1pc6rjm0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqndc9h61j74sb6c4qm4spj6eomfclkchh31or6e9q3ao5nc9ij8tj4cpqb2o3gcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti69j39pplmjjreoj66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5h64ob4s3h62oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbm1j5opg2se1h8rjp1mp8mb41bkt3fqumjf8700_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o72c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpdb5a1qrc3fl75phgvc105av7el1jppqmiapd4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o72c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk0o1p6i699hh6qckt68hqlqjjk83ude7gfqe1s0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o72c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. body:
Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zccovbis77p8pg8tvqctqab9o0hgnqn8v9mlr7do_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2opgc1or2t71c2ojctj2m1pb2cjnm9r3ac5gcji6cshjchin9ornc9qb4c5nm3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm1cr1cup32pjmc2pm2ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm4oj1cjge4oj24no)

I’ll tell you why. I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they’re white they’re evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they’re black they’re helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It’s state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn’t matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9kcftb1ea5a12kg2k8r66oo982g7ij4ae3fl670_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o72c9h2bs)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won’t survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. **[But there’s something you can do.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgd63j5hq89ct4aeh3d1vkjau6656u4vfkm5jgd8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o72c9h2bs)** That’s why I’m writing to you today. Because our fate isn’t sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I’ve made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won’t and take back our schools. **I’m going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don’t stand a chance without you. **[Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk1fnaq9ekbagd89c2huku6tp28u5hrtntmvcu60_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o72c9h2bs)** And make no mistake -- this isn’t just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It’s happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don’t take action, we’ll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Ryan J. Girdusky [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z215leu3nag2k0thaan6ml2mcmcspit3n1b9jtu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o72c9h2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp14psbthmduospugtku1ve83994oo4i5kecsodg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o72c9h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znag0bqq87gkej8p42h82lqg2jkmhcjelqaeveno_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o72c9h2bs) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zors9536dr7fuplh1c8fumvl41m8oi6h38lk3bpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o72c9h2bs)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9b08thb0df527j4kuq2m8et1arhk1hsce74doug_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o76cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3aibtfm1h977c303r28uo059r3h79f0itcuhefo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o76cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9ek8pnrafve5lqeo2iif9em9133j20jqspjv1s8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9gm9o76cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Thank you for standing with me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
|
---

Dear Friend,
Have you seen all the recent reports conjecturing about people who might be lining up to get into the Governor's race?
It's the same old political calculus we always see.
Republicans who pick and choose what administration they're going to support based on political connections, rather than a strong core of conservative ideals, are desperate to keep you - the heart and soul of our party - from finally having your voice heard.
Well, guess what? I'm not going to let them win. I stand with you.
When I announced my candidacy back on July 4 last year, I didn't need a poll to tell me whether or not I should run, and I didn't base my decision on who else might be in the race. I decided to run for Governor for one reason - I want to bring strong leadership to Beacon Hill to fight for your rights, protect your tax dollars, and make our state government more accountable.
Are you with me?
---
---
Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor

body:
Things aren't looking great...
| | |
---
I'll be honest, friend – things aren't looking great. My Election Year membership campaign expires in just a few hours, but I'm still 513 members short of my goal.
Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. That's why they're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat – no matter how much it costs.
**Right now, Marco Rubio is more vulnerable than ever – but we need resources to compete with him. With time running out before tonight's deadline, I see that you still haven't activated your membership. Senate control is riding on what happens here, so I hope I can count on you to give right now:**

[Please, activate your Election Year membership by donating $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me win in Florida and expand our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40705460/325562919/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2154-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjE5MWRiYS0wMzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3CYYMLWeSodC28D4C3BKzidyPN3ihf5kFapk3ZSjF8=)

clean_body: Things aren't looking great... | | | I'll be honest, friend – things aren't looking great. My Election Year membership campaign expires in just a few hours, but I'm still 513 members short of my goal. Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. That's why they're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat – no matter how much it costs. Right now, Marco Rubio is more vulnerable than ever – but we need resources to compete with him. With time running out before tonight's deadline, I see that you still haven't activated your membership. Senate control is riding on what happens here, so I hope I can count on you to give right now: = Thanks, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
The drive ends on Saturday night — the same night Donald Trump returns to Arizona for another rally to fire up his supporters in Arizona.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40706155/325565370/-368617150?refcode=20220115_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDVmNTY3Zi0wNjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rgwOP5mqTlFoviQMRoDsb4OlPLloGOsL9I9Ql_wsx5M=)
---

| | Derek, In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a $25 contribution between my re-election campaign for Senate and CommonGood. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.

Here’s the truth:

We’re kicking-off our mid-month fundraising drive today — one we have to launch now because we’ve started the year a bit more slowly than we’d have liked.

The drive ends on Saturday night — the same night Donald Trump returns to Arizona for another rally to fire up his supporters.

I’m sure our campaign will come up at the rally. Last time he was here, he said “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.” And I’m sure it will inspire his followers to donate and volunteer this time around, too.

So, we’re hoping for a BIG week before he arrives. The amount we raise during this drive is important, but the number of donations we receive is just as important to me. And that’s why I’m asking:

**[Can you please make today the day you split a contribution of $25 or more between my re-election campaign for the U.S. Senate and CommonGood? name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: 4 things to know right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |

Hi there – Our mid-month fundraising deadline is TOMORROW. Here’s why that’s a big deal:
* This is our **first fundraising benchmark since two extreme Republicans jumped into the race** , and election experts and news stations will use our numbers as a bellwether for the strength of our campaign.
* Senator Hassan won her last race by an extremely narrow 1,017 votes in the closest race in the country – now _The Boston Globe_ says she’s the most vulnerable incumbent.
* 7 MILLION has already been spent by GOP outside groups attacking Maggie, and we need the resources to set the record straight.
* If Democrats lose in New Hampshire, we lose the Senate majority and put Mitch McConnell back in charge.

The single most important thing you can do for Democrats is to support vulnerable incumbents like Maggie Hassan – especially ahead of our deadline on January 16th. **[Please click here to donate $5 or as much as you can (any amount makes a huge difference) so we can get your support recorded before our numbers go public.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40708041/325574029/-1281091919?refcode=e20220115_4things&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGNiNWU3NS0wZDc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-YxhkewA31thv9h9Lw4tz1hZto96MMBmCS2s_tqni2c=)** Thank you so much, Team Maggie

name: Team Beshear
subject: Can Andy count on your support every month?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
In 2019, Andy shocked the country when he won the governor's office by just 5,136 votes. The race was tough, it was expensive, but ultimately it was successful because of this grassroots team. Peter,

In 2019, Andy shocked the country when he won the governor's office by just 5,136 votes. The race was tough, it was expensive, but ultimately it was successful because of this grassroots team.

With your help, we knocked on more than 1 million doors, spoke with thousands of Kentuckians, and stood up to outside money and partisan attacks. We're ready to do it all again so we can keep Andy fighting for progress – and we're counting on your help to build another winning campaign.

One of the best ways you can support our campaign right now is by becoming a monthly donor. Knowing that we can count on your support each month helps us better plan our budget and ensure we're prepared to fight back against any attack that comes Andy's way.

**[Will you make a monthly donation to Andy's campaign? Your sustained support will help ensure we have the resources to re-elect Andy and continue making progress for the Bluegrass state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40712598/325583675/-736785727?refcode=em22_220114_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220114_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzBjMDdkMS0xMjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MENHVl-gFZWQDAc8itK3YQS53H4YaRFSnLLJK02FpOs=)** [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40712599/325583676/-736785727?refcode=em22_220114_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220114_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzBjMDdkMS0xMjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MENHVl-gFZWQDAc8itK3YQS53H4YaRFSnLLJK02FpOs=) [MAKE A ONE-TIME DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40712602/325583678/-758409691?refcode=em22_220114_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220114_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzBjMDdkMS0xMjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MENHVl-gFZWQDAc8itK3YQS53H4YaRFSnLLJK02FpOs=)
In a race that will be tough, early investments are critical. The groundwork we're able to lay now could mean the difference between four more years of progress and Republicans undoing everything we've accomplished.

He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: This is not a joke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress_**
body:
Peter --

Joe Biden just declared you an enemy of the state.

The cognitively impaired Biden shouted lines his handlers prepared for him that any American opposed to a scheme guaranteeing permanent Democrat regime rule through massive fraud was a domestic terrorist.

**Communist Democrats want to seize control of elections and put Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer in charge of voting.**

Radical leftists end goal is America transformed into a one-party socialist state.

Conservatives must fight back and elect an America First majority this November.

Firing Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer is the only way to stop this madness.

**That's why I endorsed Bo Hines for Congress in North Carolina.**

Bo is a 100% pro-Life, 100% pro-Second Amendment, 100% pro-Trump champion for the America First movement.

**[Will you join me in supporting Bo Hines for Congress by chipping in an emergency contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59487324:WUI95dHJN:m:1:2365227053:6153A1638004BE3FACD29B557BAFC38B:r)?** **[SUPPORT BO HINES
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59487324:WUI95dHJN:m:1:2365227053:6153A1638004BE3FACD29B557BAFC38B:r)** Joe Biden wasn't fooling when he smeared you and me as domestic enemies.

The Biden regime already targeted concerned moms and dads that protested school abusing their kids with mask mandates and brainwashing their children with critical race theory as domestic terrorists.

**Nancy Pelosi's goon squad on the January 6 witch hunt committee seized my electronic communications and could leak them to CNN at any moment.**

Communist Democrats like Adam Schiff teamed with RINO sellouts like Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger to throw Trump supporters in jail just because they called out the dirty tricks in the 2020 election

I'm fighting back tooth and nail.

But I need America First reinforcement in Congress who will never back down one inch when essential liberties like our ability to speak freely and Second Amendment rights are on the line.

**[That's why I'm asking you to join me in supporting Bo Hines for Congress by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or $100 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59487324:WUI95dHJN:m:1:2365227053:6153A1638004BE3FACD29B557BAFC38B:r).**

Bo Hines stood up to cancel culture fought the woke mob on college campuses.

When Democrats, their allies in Silicon Valley, and the fake news media rigged the 2020 election Bo Hines called out the fraud.

Bo Hines is not afraid to take on the tough fights.

**And Bo knows fighting for the America First, pro-Trump agenda means always going on offense.**

Right now, the stakes could not be higher.

Communist Democrats threatened an unprecedented assault on the integrity of our elections.

The Biden regime declared that anyone who exposes this un-American power grab is a domestic enemy.

Big Tech censored me, and the D.C. swamp is trying to invent ways to throw me in jail for one reason.

_I'm leading the fight to elect America Frist conservatives like Bo Hines to Congress so a new majority can_ :
---
*** **IMPEACH** Joe Biden for allowing an invasion on our southern border; *** **BUILD** Donald Trump's border wall and stop illegal immigration once and for all; *** **FIRE** Dr. Fauci for lying about the origins of the China virus and lying to Congress about funding gain of function research in Communist China; *** **DEFUND** Planned Parenthood; and *** **STOP** all unconstitutional gun control.
If you agree, America First conservatives must stop socialism and save America; then I need your help to elect Bo Hines to Congress right away.

**[To achieve that goal, I hope I can count on you to chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even the legal maximum of $2,900 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59487324:WUI95dHJN:m:1:2365227053:6153A1638004BE3FACD29B557BAFC38B:r).**

Joe Biden and the Communist Democrat grow more desperate every day.

Polls show Biden's approval rating sinking to 33% and a red wave building across America.

Now Joe Biden, his handlers, the Jihad Squad, and the rest of the Communist Democrats are threatening Americans that oppose a massive voter fraud power grab as domestic terrorists.

**I will never compromise or surrender in the fight to keep our elections free and fair.**

But I need help to stop the radical left.

That's because Democrats can always lean on the Big Tech censors and fake news media liars to bail them out.

That's why I endorsed 100% pro-Life, 100% pro-Second Amendment, and 100% pro-Trump Bo Hines for Congress in North Carolina.

That's ok.

I have a more powerful ally.

**You.**

**[And I hope I can count on your to join me in supporting Bo Hines for Congress so America First Patriots can fire Nancy Pelosi next November and take our country back](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59487324:WUI95dHJN:m:1:2365227053:6153A1638004BE3FACD29B557BAFC38B:r).**

**[SUPPORT BO HINES
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59487324:WUI95dHJN:m:1:2365227053:6153A1638004BE3FACD29B557BAFC38B:r)**

Sincerely, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59487324:WUI95dHJN:m:1:2365227053:6153A1638004BE3FACD29B557BAFC38B:r)

subject: This is what momentum looks like
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40717796/325604336/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220115Momentum_tw_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDU0OTVkZS0xYTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nlNr7x5Q0F-H68E8Q8ezCy6EzwT3mvAiTtmkqWVPNwg=)
---
Team, We wanted to make sure you saw the HUGE news: Despite launching this campaign as a first-time candidate with no cash on hand, with your help, **Wes just made history by raising $4.8 million, the most money raised by a first-time candidate in Maryland at this stage of the race.** And just take a look at this _Washington Post_ headline: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40717797/325604337/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220115Momentum_tw_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDU0OTVkZS0xYTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nlNr7x5Q0F-H68E8Q8ezCy6EzwT3mvAiTtmkqWVPNwg=)

This unprecedented fundraising haul for a first-time candidate in such a crowded primary demonstrates the unrivaled enthusiasm for Wes’s candidacy and vision for our state.

Hey, friend! It’s a Saturday and I’m sure you’re busy (I’m on the campaign trail making a stop in Silver City today to meet with folks and collect nomination petition signatures!), so I’ll make this quick. We’re already halfway through the month of January, and less than six months out from the primary election here in New Mexico. Can you believe it? **While my team and I hustle to collect hundreds of signatures to get me — and our positive vision for NM-02 — on the ballot before our Feb. 1 deadline, it leaves us with less time to focus on fundraising.** That’s why I’m coming to you. It’s a Saturday and I’m sure you’re busy (I’m on the campaign trail making a stop in Silver City today to meet with folks and collect nomination petition signatures!), so I’ll make this quick. While my team and I hustle to collect hundreds of signatures to get me — and our positive vision for NM-02 — on the ballot before our Feb. 1 deadline, it leaves us with less time to focus on fundraising. That’s why I’m coming to you. Right now, we’re a little behind where we thought we’d be at this point in the month. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Everything you do for our campaign to flip NM-02 this year is so deeply appreciated. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Can I count on you to come through with a $3 contribution before midnight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
When you get outraised, you get outspent
#

Friend,
Elections shouldn’t be decided by which candidate raises the most money. They should be decided by the people, based on their values and priorities.
But I have to be honest with you — we got outraised by a lot last quarter, and that puts us at a big disadvantage going into the next phase of this race.
Because when you get outraised, you get outspent. That means our opponents have mountains of cash they can spend talking to voters across Pennsylvania.
I’m not worried, though. I’ve been the underdog before, and I know that all you need to win is a scrappy team with a whole lot of heart (like this one.)
So we set a goal to make sure we stay on track to hitting our January fundraising goal, and if we can bring in 250 donations by midnight tonight, we’ll be in good shape.
[Here comes the part where I ask for your help: Can I count on you to come through with a $3 contribution before midnight? If everyone does their part, I know we can hit this goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40718042/325606104/-358086307?refcode2=f07c7c0c-1c76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220115-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDdjN2MwYy0xYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEEFfcPj4o3hN2YtoeI74rxHB7QznkkzGcMjz95cnAU=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40718043/325606105/-358086307?refcode2=f07c7c0c-1c76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220115-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDdjN2MwYy0xYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEEFfcPj4o3hN2YtoeI74rxHB7QznkkzGcMjz95cnAU=)**
Our movement is for working people, powered by working people. We’re funded by lots of folks giving small amounts of money.
Each donation plays a huge part in our ability to get our message out and build a broad coalition of folks supporting our fight for working families.
I know it can be hard to imagine that what we do today will make such a big impact in an election months away, but it’s true. And that’s why your contribution is so important.
**So if you’re able to chip in today, will you?**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40718044/325606106/-358086307?refcode2=f07c7c0c-1c76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220115-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDdjN2MwYy0xYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEEFfcPj4o3hN2YtoeI74rxHB7QznkkzGcMjz95cnAU=)**
Putting your dollars behind our movement sends a message that says working people deserve leaders who answer to them — and that’s such a powerful thing.
Thanks so much for your support,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

This is an email explaining why it is so important to kick Mike DeWine out of office and kick start Ohio’s comeback — _so it’s pretty long._ **[I hope you’ll read the entire thing first, but with our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight, would you consider chipping in any amount to our campaign for Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40718179/325607871/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.925a332e-1c76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.925a332e-1c76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVhMzMyZS0xYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNCCOvRgHs0RFOrz5Ik8Uwnts4I6kTrICsazEBA_2yE=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40718182/325607877/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.925a332e-1c76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.925a332e-1c76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVhMzMyZS0xYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNCCOvRgHs0RFOrz5Ik8Uwnts4I6kTrICsazEBA_2yE=) _**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40718183/325607878/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.925a332e-1c76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.925a332e-1c76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVhMzMyZS0xYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNCCOvRgHs0RFOrz5Ik8Uwnts4I6kTrICsazEBA_2yE=)**_ I was born and raised in Ohio and I’m raising my son with my wife here, which is why I’m committed to making sure it’s a place for our families to thrive for generations to come. One where the middle class not just grows, but flourishes.
One where Ohio leads the nation in growth and industry. **[So if that plan sounds pretty good to you, can you chip in before our midnight deadline? John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: This is personal for me, friend. | Look friend: I need to be up front. This is an email explaining why it is so important to kick Mike DeWine out of office and kick start Ohio’s comeback — so it’s pretty long. = = = I was born and raised in Ohio and I’m raising my son with my wife here, which is why I’m committed to making sure it’s a place for our families to thrive for generations to come. Our state used to be a leader in innovation, the home of presidents and astronauts and industry. But thanks to decades of Republican rule, now with Mike DeWine at the helm, our families are struggling to get by. We can choose a different path though, friend — one powered by big, bold ideas. One where our children have opportunities and stay in our state. One where the middle class not just grows, but flourishes. One where Ohio leads the nation in growth and industry. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks so much, John = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. From the day we launched this campaign back in August, this has always been a movement by Tennesseans, for Tennesseeans. No matter what you look like, the zip code you live in, the party you’ve voted for in the past, or where you grew up: If you believe that it’s long past time for real change in Tennessee, this campaign is for you.
**And now, we have the chance to show it by putting up big grassroots fundraising numbers ahead of tonight’s deadline.**
Every dollar that folks like you give is a dollar for greater economic opportunity, for strong public education, for accessible and affordable healthcare, for strengthening voting rights, for action on climate change, and for honest, compassionate leadership here in Tennessee.
I know we’ve asked a lot from you over the last few months, but with time running out, I need to ask again: [**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to help us hit our goal before tonight’s midnight deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40718612/325609018/-371068714?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220115mm5dltonight_DJM_opntl_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjkwN2Q5OS0xYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4nHBjP7U32bn7zKL1X920XrVnkAS5X9S0p4HEdhgpys=)

Dr. Martin

| Peter,

I was born in and have lived in Orange County my entire life. Living here has instilled a strong sense of community in me. I know how important it is to look after each other, and that's exactly what I want to do in Congress.

[_**But I can 't get there without your help. So please Peter, will you contribute to my campaign before the mid-month deadline? We need to raise $5,000 before midnight!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBZHaoJMj85mp3ZENLNnV9oFGLgCZYKO1olT1j9rewI=/roUjaTG3afsKxq_fZv5692zfUJITkuzEW2ra-OR1RU0=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220115-1-EM)

Falling behind in this race could set our democracy back decades.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40719388/325613069/-182240488?refcode=EM_FR_220115mm_MM_TC_CC_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmExYjRiMi0xZTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-1RawejfdGInKjNWcFHMUPGYr2nLVFOXQ1yiyH6tvg=)

Team, Building an Ohio representative of all of us is my top priority. As a lifelong resident of this state, it pains me to see efforts to destroy our democracy prevail. First, Republicans upheld false conspiracies and lies, claiming, despite overwhelming evidence, that the election was stolen. Then, they used their positions to gerrymander maps and eliminate access to the ballot. Their behavior puts our democracy in danger, folks, and it's up to us to act now to avoid further damage. As Secretary of State, I will fight tirelessly to strengthen our collective voice and ensure that every eligible voter has the opportunity to cast their ballot in a manner that is **safe** , **secure** , and **accessible.** Together we can turn the tide and bring in a new era that places Ohioans and their concerns at the forefront. We can't afford to miss this opportunity, and I can't do it without you. [**Will you pitch in $10, $15, or whatever you can before our mid-month deadline expires tomorrow night?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40719389/325613070/-1374079767?refcode=EM_FR_220115mm_MM_TC_CC_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmExYjRiMi0xZTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-1RawejfdGInKjNWcFHMUPGYr2nLVFOXQ1yiyH6tvg=) So far, we've met 54% of our goal, but as the clock continues to count down, it's imperative that we buckle down and push even harder. name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m embarrassed to ask.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu61vgtu5at1m3gbl1u16mnb9g9075kuefgcdjlg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm4pb4c5h2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zomvd9qa2cfko5barjt00rkpdkrt7h74ssgeuj9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm4pb4c5h2bs)
---
[**RUSH $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj2vfsbqo2jf79rj2edch668ukknldblomat7qj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm4pb4c5h2bs)
---
[**RUSH $100**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcptbg7p16fsrkarhe5f6ik1olqe5a2mlhlpp820_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm4pb4c5h2bs)
---
[**RUSH $250**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcct69pelpqe9anu1nl7es9ehnsda3avtnfpob80_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm4pb4c5h2bs)
---
[**RUSH $500**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z05qt9ja5dg5qkofln1qdo0rt46h5t6128hiqek8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm4pb4c5h2bs)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zis82tflc2eg0kk5899fj2u4t68ap3a27q77sho0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm4pb4c5h2bs)

Senator John Kennedy

name: Team Hern
subject: Failed Leadership & Deadly Violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
The numbers are staggering. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d644d4f2e2821528/752ce2f66b1587bcc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter,

The numbers are in they are staggering – it’s absolutely tragic and unacceptable.

12 major cities hit all-time record high records.

Democrats' embrace of the extreme-left “Defund the Police” movement has emboldened criminals and put ALL of us at greater risk of becoming victims!

The 2022 elections are a battle for the heart and soul of America. We need to fight with all we’ve got to win big, restore law and order, and get our great nation back on track.

Kevin’s 100% committed to getting the job done. _Are you?_

_**SERVICE NOTICE **_
**EFFECTIVE DECEMBER 31, 2021**

**Dear Fellow Conservative,

The purpose of this letter is to inform you that your Trump Membership expired effective December 31. Despite the fact that we have sent you warnings and notices earlier, you have failed to respond, forcing us into a situation where we have no choice but to take these drastic measures.

You were well aware of the consequences, and despite being warned in the past year, you have failed to alter your actions. As a result, your membership expired 5 days ago and was subsequently canceled.

However, we will allow you this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to renew your 2022 Trump membership. Failure will result in abandoning the GOP and forever losing the chance to renew your Trump Membership in the future. **

subject: Dan Patrick is trying to buy this election. We can stop him.

#

Friends, I’m a believer that this campaign is about building a relationship with the 29 million people who call our beloved Texas home. We should be able to count on our elected officials to listen to us and represent us, but that’s not what we’re getting with Dan Patrick — who consistently sides with the shadowy groups bankrolling his campaign over the folks he was elected to serve. I’m running for Lieutenant Governor to flip Texas and put power back where it belongs — in the hands of the people. [**If you’re with me in this fight, I need you to donate $10 or more to help us reach our first fundraising deadline of 2022 by tomorrow at midnight:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40720180/325617016/134239794?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220115_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWUwNWE3OC0yMjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEDLTbyjVhBCoztbUihBvEU6TW8-tD2rZzySKIOfDQg=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40720181/325617017/134239794?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220115_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWUwNWE3OC0yMjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEDLTbyjVhBCoztbUihBvEU6TW8-tD2rZzySKIOfDQg=)

Folks, there’s just no other way to say it: Texas is a battleground state this year. Everyone from national news outlets to the GOP establishment knows that this will be one of the closest statewide races in the country.
That’s why Dan Patrick and his millionaire buddies are pulling out all the stops to try to buy this election right out from under us. But I know we can defeat them all. I’ve talked to so many of y’all over the past few months and here’s what I’ve learned: **The good people of Texas are ready for change. **
Thanks to the support of this powerful grassroots team, we’re starting this year off with significant resources to mount a competitive race to unseat the worst Lieutenant Governor in the country.
It’s critical we continue to grow and sustain our movement all the way through to November. [**So, can I count on you to pitch in $10 or more to help us meet our first deadline of 2022?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40720182/325617018/134239794?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220115_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWUwNWE3OC0yMjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEDLTbyjVhBCoztbUihBvEU6TW8-tD2rZzySKIOfDQg=)

clean_body: | Friends, I’m a believer that this campaign is about building a relationship with the 29 million people who call our beloved Texas home. We should be able to count on our elected officials to listen to us and represent us, but that’s not what we’re getting with Dan Patrick — who consistently sides with the shadowy groups bankrolling his campaign over the folks he was elected to serve. I’m running for Lieutenant Governor to flip Texas and put power back where it belongs — in the hands of the people. = | = Folks, there’s just no other way to say it: Texas is a battleground state this year. Everyone from national news outlets to the GOP establishment knows that this will be one of the closest statewide races in the country. That’s why Dan Patrick and his millionaire buddies are pulling out all the stops to try to buy this election right out from under us. But I know we can defeat them all. I’ve talked to so many of y’all over the past few months and here’s what I’ve learned: The good people of Texas are ready for change. Thanks to the support of this powerful grassroots team, we’re starting this year off with significant resources to mount a competitive race to unseat the worst Lieutenant Governor in the country. It’s critical we continue to grow and sustain our movement all the way through to November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = I’m refusing to accept a single donation from corporate PACs, because I never want there to be a question of who I’m working for. Folks, my number one priority is delivering for New Mexico and our country. That includes responding to the urgent needs folks have right now, and protecting our planet for our children and future generations. We also need folks getting this done on the local and state level. That’s why, in addition to supporting my fights in the U.S. Senate, my campaign team works hard all year long to elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot. **We can’t do this work without your support.** But my team just told me we’re falling short of our fundraising goal ahead of our first deadline of the year. **Can you add a donation of any amount to help us catch up? name: Jamarah Hayner, Team Bass
subject: Karen rolled out her policy plan to tackle homelessness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
I have two updates for you, friend:

Yesterday, Karen rolled out her policy plan to tackle homelessness in Los Angeles. Currently, more than 40,000 Angelenos are experiencing homelessness, and over 350,000 Angelenos are at risk of becoming homeless.

Karen is ready to take decisive action to lead the city through this crisis. Her plan includes stepping stones to housing 15,000 people by the end of year one of her administration, dramatically reducing street homelessness, ending street encampments, and leading on mental health and substance abuse treatment.

Anyone who is serious about being our city's next mayor should have solving homelessness as their top priority. Karen has the experience and the plans to move our city forward, and she needs our help making her vision for L.A. a reality.

**[Tomorrow at midnight, our campaign is facing our first mid-month deadline of the election year, and we're working to raise $10,000 before then. The primary is only months away, so what we raise now will impact how many people we can reach with Karen's vision for L.A. Will you chip in before tomorrow's deadline to help us stay on track?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40721024/325621224/-1949501433?ms=em22_220115_mm1_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx&refcode=em22_220115_mm1_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx&source=em22_220115_mm1_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220115_mm1_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=II%2Fux%2FlzaxT7FPlMgTGI0M0KvY9KipxpMVMSD%2FxRHlzFk6dSDSSbuA3ckY8hAwgTbfpJs9hM7oc6nKAcWnpsug1exVX6EXvbmn0orK4%2BXFd6amj1Rsm%2FSfUNDqvBNkycWNR8m5s0OlWIaa6bUO4kyA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmUyNjVmYi0yNDc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3i1IM44FIqXXUfVPWofhswZ0v8TdzrxAeKfWk_tB-w=&emci=23559b14-8875-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=82e265fb-2476-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2429742)**

But right now, we're still $12,855 short of our first mid-month goal this year, and my 11:59 p.m. deadline is tomorrow. = | | = Thanks for helping me start this year off on the right foot. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40720942/325620673/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTRlZDc4ZS0yNDc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SUl88lP5r3jtAZWWgSeWScBlgIedxEOs0cnVmZp6JLI=)
Friends — We hate to bother you on a Saturday, but this is important. A few days ago, James Carville reached out to let you know our team had set a goal to reach 1,000 new contributions before our mid-month fundraising deadline expires at midnight tonight. Since then, we’ve seen 563 new donors jump on board, which is GREAT! We’ll need all hands on deck to protect and expand our Senate majority come November. But to reach our goal today, we still need 437 donations to come through the door in the next 12 hours. It’s a steep goal, but we’ve seen this team rise to the challenge time and time again, and we know if anyone can make it happen, it’s you. We can’t afford to lose a single seat this year, and Mitch McConnell knows it. He’s laser-focused on winning back the Senate, and he won’t go down without a fight. That’s why we have to ensure we have the resources needed to protect vulnerable Senators in Georgia, Arizona, and New Hampshire, while simultaneously fighting to flip states like Florida, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania. To support campaigns in so many states at once takes significant resources, so we set mid-month goals to keep our fundraising on track. That’s why it’s imperative we get those 437 individual donations before midnight tonight. name: Team Schiff
subject: Campaigns are expensive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Hey there, Derek. Here’s a painfully honest email written by a real person. **In order to power through this year, we have a big ask of you. We want you to become a monthly supporter of Adam.** Before you make a final decision (or close this email!) please allow us a moment to explain why your support is a really really big deal for us and our boss. Campaigns are expensive. Not only does Adam need to pay amazing people (like us 😊) a living wage to help run the day-to-day functions of his campaign, but we also use our resources to help Democrats all across the country. Last cycle, Adam did more to help elect Democrats to the House AND Senate, than just about any other Member of Congress. (Not including the Speaker, of course!) This is in addition to fending off a classic California Jungle Primary (aka Adam vs. many, many challengers), introducing himself to tens of thousands of new voters, and doing his super important day job. We’re going to have to spend millions on grassroots campaigning, media in the expensive LA market, online ads, and good old-fashioned snail mail (yes, that still happens). _The bottom line is this: it’s a lot of work, and it takes a lot — a lot — of resources._ Here’s the rub, Derek: a monthly donation helps us prepare for the challenges ahead. If we know we can budget an extra $5 or $15 each month, it’s actually quite a big deal. That could mean an extra lawn sign in a voter’s lawn, an extra brochure or door hanger for a volunteer precinct walker, an extra ad seen on an undecided voter’s Facebook feed, or an extra few bucks to a member of Congress under siege from Republican attacks in a swing seat. **So what do you say, Derek? That could mean an extra lawn sign in a voter’s lawn, an extra brochure or door hanger for a volunteer precinct walker, an extra ad seen on an undecided voter’s Facebook feed, or an extra few bucks to a member of Congress under siege from Republican attacks in a swing seat. So what do you say, Derek? Will you become a monthly supporter of Adam and his campaign? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Just think, with a monthly donation in the amount of a cup of coffee (or two) you can make a big difference for our campaign and campaigns of Democrats around the country. And Adam will be so incredibly grateful! So will we! Thanks for all your support. And thank you for reading our email! It means a lot! — Your Friends at Team Schiff Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fd11af64b5784e92be478868f4041e5c&_e=QojWrunBHqRtCiXqSho020mrxG44MVN_10b45Otx5kpIsgCdUgRoNa7-vGtmaMe5eeKMLlaF1-pCfaI8C5k0C-XH86EXYC_Ue6Sp7oZJQx3uUsoV3uGK4TODojE3E-X3DfnpHt4kjT0xI6flK_qFDZ7KVC6jNfgrBC0qjpINGRAgxZoEFR31xFhwfT7DvUro7rRKo6lz0qOhD2ilTRGGNdHJRVulOSCLdGL-9L0ifpV_Ld9Yqeod8_vza_7bdYE4_zxkn-LgoKc4ZQOEjZGgaNP5SAHJIqad_4S_yktA1QpAgq6sPjkdJR17sBogb-c4rUZkC0iqddoRbg6y7nsom3qsVlBnNAq7huP7_zWnVUk8jVCJ0Mx8fejcRvV0EpUVDkdKn92sEetCWIP-1bHHGi74nPKfIQAVdf4ZOQ-GILyD83iF0YSuWvzUfN_-z0FrLlxGbK_mpS-FzQNTvfkurA%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

I've been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow American, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fd11af64b5784e92be478868f4041e5c&_e=QojWrunBHqRtCiXqSho020mrxG44MVN_10b45Otx5kpIsgCdUgRoNa7-vGtmaMe5eeKMLlaF1-pCfaI8C5k0C-XH86EXYC_Ue6Sp7oZJQx3uUsoV3uGK4TODojE3E-X3DfnpHt4kjT0xI6flK_qFDZ7KVC6jNfgrBC0qjpINGRAgxZoEFR31xFhwfT7DvUro7rRKo6lz0qOhD2ilTRGGNdHJRVulOSCLdGL-9L0ifpV_Ld9Yqeod8_vza_7bdYE4QnE_MW9726Dm-V__uPS05nugQrVLb7TTI4DQmqkp8ldu-vkbMkjpIMMJWXQUKsrRiVLMuKHuvRa6V4A-at4Mkc9HlGyCEpXo1unMKkkUl0M-GCcUWzPL659m6oD5OVfnYbjNyobuPfT2CuXGE9wZTq1-cvgIP6tL9RT7QSJX7rMJg_ZrTJeVqLYWMo8VlQOiLaQuOiYYamxZ2zTPnBvjWg%3D%3D) **

I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He's a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that's come across his desk in Washington.

He's pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Fellow American. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

Thanks,

body:
We need to hit our first deadline to stay on track.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40722685/325625887/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.15_b1_mmd-grace_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUwZGRiZi0yODc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YYmVgZVfVC2xeNV8jvEoFeIF3VCYH7vCVajCKC6qY2I=)
---
Friends,

I certainly don’t need to tell you that this is a very important year -- and hopefully the one where we elect Brad as our next Representative and defeat a Capitol Insurrectionist.

And while we’ve accomplished a lot since we launched our campaign last October, we have so much planned for 2022.

In order to win in November, we will have to run ads, host events, and talk to voters in every corner of the district -- but all of that takes an enormous amount of resources. And right now I’m looking at the budget and we’re just short of our mid-month goal.

Additionally, our opponent was just endorsed by the Congressional Leadership Fund -- an extremely well-funded conservative group that can flood this race with outside money.

We need to hit our goals to counter any lies they plan to spread. But our mid-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow and we’re still $1450 short of our goal.

**[Please, we can’t afford to miss our first fundraising goal of 2022. Will you help us defeat this dangerous Capitol Insurrectionist by chipping in $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40722686/325625888/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.15_b1_MMD-grace_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.15_b1_mmd-grace_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUwZGRiZi0yODc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YYmVgZVfVC2xeNV8jvEoFeIF3VCYH7vCVajCKC6qY2I=)** | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40722687/325625889/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.15_b1_MMD-grace_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.15_b1_mmd-grace_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUwZGRiZi0yODc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YYmVgZVfVC2xeNV8jvEoFeIF3VCYH7vCVajCKC6qY2I=)

clean_body: We need to hit our first deadline to stay on track. | = Friends, I certainly don’t need to tell you that this is a very important year -- and hopefully the one where we elect Brad as our next Representative and defeat a Capitol Insurrectionist. And while we’ve accomplished a lot since we launched our campaign last October, we have so much planned for 2022. In order to win in November, we will have to run ads, host events, and talk to voters in every corner of the district -- but all of that takes an enormous amount of resources. And right now I’m looking at the budget and we’re just short of our mid-month goal. Additionally, our opponent was just endorsed by the Congressional Leadership Fund -- an extremely well-funded conservative group that can flood this race with outside money. We need to hit our goals to counter any lies they plan to spread. But our mid-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow and we’re still $1450 short of our goal. = | = = = = = = Brad is super excited about talking to as many WI-03 voters as he can between now and November. He cares about the everyday issues people like you and me face, and every conversation he has motivates him further. I don’t want to disappoint him and downsize our campaign plan, but we’ll have to make changes if we don’t hit our mid-month goal. **=** Thank you, Grace Fleming Campaign Manager, Pfaff for Congress | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

name: Jessica Mason
subject: Finding a place to live is getting harder
body:
North Texas home prices set a new record in December of last year, but the total sales for 2021 were down overall. Rental costs are no better.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40722874/325626323/-1288899752?refcode=220115_FR_housing_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDkxYjE1MS0yOTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a-9RuCHmwNXjl9bRcogIVM5X33xYijUtcgseaSZfApU=)
---
Team New Deal,

North Texas home prices set a new record in December of last year, but the total sales for 2021 were down overall. Rental costs are no better.

**_The real estate market is working for those at the top and leaving everyday Texans struggling to find affordable options. I'm tired of it._**

Having worked in affordable housing, I’ve seen the impacts of gentrification and people being evicted from their homes with nowhere to go. **No family should have to go through that.**

The government MUST do more to ensure that working-class folks have a roof over their heads by providing federal assistance and working with real estate developers to find solutions that are beneficial to them and their business while also finding homes for the lower middle class.

I believe that everyone deserves to have a place to call home where they feel safe and sheltered, and I need your help so that I can make it to Congress to champion affordable options and federal housing assistance. **[Please rush a contribution now so that I can fight to ensure all Texans can afford a place to live.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40722876/325626325/-1288899752?refcode=220115_FR_housing_A_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDkxYjE1MS0yOTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a-9RuCHmwNXjl9bRcogIVM5X33xYijUtcgseaSZfApU=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **********[**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40722878/325626327/-1288899752?refcode=220115_FR_housing_A_EL10&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDkxYjE1MS0yOTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a-9RuCHmwNXjl9bRcogIVM5X33xYijUtcgseaSZfApU=)**********

clean_body: North Texas home prices set a new record in December of last year, but the total sales for 2021 were down overall. Rental costs are no better. | | | = Team New Deal, North Texas home prices set a new record in December of last year, but the total sales for 2021 were down overall. Rental costs are no better. The real estate market is working for those at the top and leaving everyday Texans struggling to find affordable options. I'm tired of it. Having worked in affordable housing, I’ve seen the impacts of gentrification and people being evicted from their homes with nowhere to go. No family should have to go through that. The government MUST do more to ensure that working-class folks have a roof over their heads by providing federal assistance and working with real estate developers to find solutions that are beneficial to them and their business while also finding homes for the lower middle class. I believe that everyone deserves to have a place to call home where they feel safe and sheltered, and I need your help so that I can make it to Congress to champion affordable options and federal housing assistance. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ********=****** ****** ****** | | ********=******** | ********=******** ****** ****** | | ********=******** | ********=******** ****** ****** | | ********=******** ****** ****** Thanks for being in this fight with me. Hey team, it’s Hannah — Ashley’s campaign manager. It’s already mid-January (how are we already two weeks into 2022?!) and that means **we’re facing our mid-month fundraising goal tonight at midnight**. The truth is, we’re not where we planned to be at this point in the month. If we’re going to flip this swing district blue for the first time in years and send a young, bold, woman, combat veteran to fight for the people of PA-01 and our democracy in Congress this November, _we can’t afford to lose momentum._ **[We have to hit each and every goal to stay on track. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40724029/325628696/-1905045093?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220115_FR_BIO_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmIzMzFmNC0yYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lJI7lHQCnwWyymumJl2UMM8hnM2qI5UxOrjZcVAZ5kA=)
I grew up in a working-class family, as one of eight siblings. _(Yep, you read that right -- there were 8 of us!)_
My father was a military veteran who worked at a steel plant and my mother had her hands full raising me and my seven siblings.
Growing up in a big, working-class family taught me that hard-working families can succeed when we have institutions that uplift everyone -- _not just those at the top._
When I was young, both my parents were denied health coverage because of preexisting conditions. My mom suffered a heart attack just one month before she qualified for Medicare, and my parents nearly lost their home as the medical bills piled up.
Watching them continue to provide for their family in the face of so many hardships instilled in me the values I later built my campaign on: **the cooperation to build a strong team, the humility to listen and learn from others, and the dedication to give your work all you’ve got.**
When I first ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada, my mission was to fight for hardworking families and with the help of this team, _we won._
The people of Nevada’s 3rd District are at the heart of everything I do. I know how important it is to fight for issues like health care and child care, _because those issues impacted my family too._
Now, I’m facing reelection, and in order to keep this seat blue and continue fighting for Nevada’s hardworking families, I’m going to need your support. [Together, we can continue to fight for progress in Battleground Nevada. Will you chip in right now and support my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40724030/325628697/-1905045093?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220115_FR_BIO_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmIzMzFmNC0yYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lJI7lHQCnwWyymumJl2UMM8hnM2qI5UxOrjZcVAZ5kA=)

name: Team Engel
subject: Trump is here in Arizona today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40723984/325628647/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmIzMzFmNC0yYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2sLUeAPtX1_yUYWraFOTF7fE4_0AkAvk5A3y_JTOm_w=&emci=80533a4e-7575-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=0bb331f4-2c76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
We're sorry to be the bearer of bad news but, **Trump,** **the worst president of our lifetime, is here in Arizona today.**
Why? To prop up his endorsed extremist candidates and continue spreading baseless conspiracy theories about the pandemic and the 2020 presidential election.
Now, Trump is here to whip his supporters into a fundraising frenzy and squeeze as much money out of our state as possible.
We know that makes a lot of you angry. And it should. It makes us angry, too. But do you know what would make _Trump angry?_

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: This is hard to say.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z305mtcg9fiiimj5iaheolf8080apgr86vfdo38o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm9or0c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onh6lj64ctgmgqn4ohheljbccj4mkpb1ornmlim6t5kcopn2t70mop76ppl6iomfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb0mdgmfcjhcpojecr4cuobapbi4no)
You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znslu9oe6q0jfu6gr3834oc6n5si5eu1psbghthg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm9or0c3h2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi2icum350ukahuf1u3n3fgrj6hgpqmgl34mnhho_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm9or0c3h2bs)
---
[**RUSH $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9odsc9vfobjjmv9qit5t77vjcq3hbehc4qd629g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm9or0c3h2bs)
---
[**RUSH $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn6tmorhq5fh01g6jvkneusds2ueppiaf3leae88_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm9or0c3h2bs)
---
[**RUSH $250**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zijkksl407l6ieacbvhl6ge4k1385unq8r9lfj38_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm9or0c3h2bs)
---
[**RUSH $500**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za0nlrf0av20110jqfuboadu0bt4qhj6to32jnb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm9or0c3h2bs)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztpdlfv0g6n66e672gb63j5jr1vdlnc2p9gshpjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9hm9or0c3h2bs)

Senator John Kennedy

name: Ron Johnson
subject: 🚨DECISION MADE🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3ailg--fgxr-4qqlpo3&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative,
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like _The New York Times_ , _Washington Post_ , and the _Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why today, I am officially announcing my re-election campaign for the Wisconsin Senate seat.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Fellow Conservative. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can.

And that's why I need your help.

**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ailg-1tcvj-4qqlpo7/ "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [FIGHT FOR FREEDOM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ailg-1tcvk-4qqlpo8/ "Fight for Freedom")
---

P.S. As the Left's number one target, they want to silence my voice. Liberal media conglomerates, talk shows, and newspapers will be pushing their viewers and readers to support liberal candidates that will work to tear down our institutions and impose their agenda by spreading their false and manipulative message. I really need your help.

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ailg-1tcvl-4qqlpo9/ "RonJohnsonFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Ron Johnson:_

Thank you for standing strong with me, Fellow Conservative. While the media tries to smear me, I am not afraid of standing up for the truth. I appreciate you joining me in the battle for Wisconsin against the Radical Democrats.

Recently, CNN ranked my seat #3 most likely to flip. Reports are also saying that even the THREAT of losing my seat could derail plans to take back the Senate. The thought of losing WI is terrifying -- it’s just one more step towards destroying Trump’s Legacy.

So I need you to step up and stand strong with me. **[Please click here to donate now](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ailg-1tcvm-4qqlpo0/ "Please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for being a patriot,

Ron Johnson
