name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Are We About to See the Abolition of the State Income Tax? – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132242?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**The 2022 legislative session in Jackson began with a bang! ** The House voted 92-12 to axe the state income tax. This massive majority means that income tax abolition not only has overwhelming Republican support, but Speaker Gunn, who has made income tax abolition his flagship policy, can claim that there is a cross-party consensus emerging, too. **So are we actually going to see the state income tax abolished?** I am cautiously optimistic. With a billion-dollar surplus in the state budget, the money is there to allow us to raise the tax exemption threshold so that no individual worker in Mississippi would pay any income tax on their first $37,000 earnings (no couple would pay tax on their first $75,000.) **Why would anyone now oppose giving Mississippi this much-needed boost? Because some politicians believe that they are better at spending your money than you are.** A billion-dollar surplus is a lot of money, and instead of using it to give every Mississippi worker a tax break, a certain sort of politicians might be tempted to dream up new ways of spending that money on their favorite boondoggle. Think of how many self-aggrandizing schemes they could spend your money on instead .... Of course, no one opposed to income tax abolition is ever going to put it quite like that. They will claim it is unaffordable, or that it might lead to tax increases elsewhere. Neither claim is credible. **The beauty of the bill that the House has just passed is that it ensures we do not have to make massive spending cuts in order to afford income tax abolition.** How is that possible? By committing to using any increase in tax revenues over and above 1.5 percent to incrementally phase out the income tax altogether. As for the idea that abolishing the income tax would merely mean tax rises elsewhere, the bill does raise the sales tax from 7 percent to 8.5 percent. But it immediately reduces grocery tax from 7 percent to 5.5 percent and slashes car tax by almost half. **If you hear a politician opposing income tax abolition on the grounds that they support tax cuts, they probably don’t really favor either.** Following this week’s vote in the House, we have a historic opportunity to make our state properly competitive. After years of seeing young Mississippians move away to find work, we have a chance to ensure that our state flourishes the way other southern states have. Let’s hope that our lawmakers seize this chance and make income tax abolition happen.

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, The 2022 legislative session in Jackson began with a bang! The House voted 92-12 to axe the state income tax. This massive majority means that income tax abolition not only has overwhelming Republican support, but Speaker Gunn, who has made income tax abolition his flagship policy, can claim that there is a cross-party consensus emerging, too. So are we actually going to see the state income tax abolished? I am cautiously optimistic. With a billion-dollar surplus in the state budget, the money is there to allow us to raise the tax exemption threshold so that no individual worker in Mississippi would pay any income tax on their first $37,000 earnings (no couple would pay tax on their first $75,000.) Why would anyone now oppose giving Mississippi this much-needed boost? Because some politicians believe that they are better at spending your money than you are. A billion-dollar surplus is a lot of money, and instead of using it to give every Mississippi worker a tax break, a certain sort of politicians might be tempted to dream up new ways of spending that money on their favorite boondoggle. Think of how many self-aggrandizing schemes they could spend your money on instead .... Of course, no one opposed to income tax abolition is ever going to put it quite like that. They will claim it is unaffordable, or that it might lead to tax increases elsewhere. Neither claim is credible. The beauty of the bill that the House has just passed is that it ensures we do not have to make massive spending cuts in order to afford income tax abolition. How is that possible? By committing to using any increase in tax revenues over and above 1.5 percent to incrementally phase out the income tax altogether. As for the idea that abolishing the income tax would merely mean tax rises elsewhere, the bill does raise the sales tax from 7 percent to 8.5 percent. But it immediately reduces grocery tax from 7 percent to 5.5 percent and slashes car tax by almost half. If you hear a politician opposing income tax abolition on the grounds that they support tax cuts, they probably don’t really favor either. Following this week’s vote in the House, we have a historic opportunity to make our state properly competitive. After years of seeing young Mississippians move away to find work, we have a chance to ensure that our state flourishes the way other southern states have. Let’s hope that our lawmakers seize this chance and make income tax abolition happen. | | Warm Regards, | | WE'RE HIRING! name: Derek Marshall
subject: It’s time to abolish the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
Earlier this week, President Biden re-opened a crucial conversation that has animated Democrats since practically the moment the 2020 elections were called. Should the Senate keep or abolish the filibuster? As a proud progressive Democrat, you probably know where I stand. **I wholeheartedly believe that we should leave the filibuster in the past where it belongs, and let the Senate rule by simple majority like the rest of the elements of our hallowed government. **
But here’s what’s different now. **President Biden’s speech adds pressure and urgency to the debate over the filibuster.** His support now gives Democrats more leverage to work with to persuade holdouts to vote for the proposed filibuster rule change. What’s more, President Biden has drawn a clear line in the sand, sending a strong message to those who refuse to vote for the change: **history will not remember them well. **
**[I’m running against a Republican who consistently votes against the interests of my community. He even voted against the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. The Republican Party is out of line and must be stopped at any cost. Will you support my challenge with a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40725690/325636910/-1402176493?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2YyOGY1Mi0zNTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSeBtK_v9dARDXaGaJXSi5RQwuihyeLjLBoFp3PTIRw=)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40725691/325636911/-1402176493?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2YyOGY1Mi0zNTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSeBtK_v9dARDXaGaJXSi5RQwuihyeLjLBoFp3PTIRw=)**
Republicans and even some Democratic holdouts are supporting a rule that was part of the racist playbook used to defend segregation during Jim Crow. **There’s a reason why the Founding Fathers did not support a 60-40 filibuster rule, even likening it to tyranny.** While Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Mitt Romney would have you believe that minority rule in the Senate is a unique and important check in our system of governance, their party has itself done away with the filibuster when it suited them.**The Republicans are playing a game of pure partisan politics. **
**But the thing is, politics is not a game.** Politics have a real, tangible impact on our lives. All of us are affected by policy every single day. **And the filibuster is holding back so much important policy that would be life changing for millions of us.** Voting rights expansion, anti-discrimination, equal rights for all genders, pro-immigration reform: all of it could be on the table without the filibuster.
We have the power now, which means we have to grab this moment and do what is right. **But we also must hold the majority. We have to ensure that we can execute a bold, progressive agenda without the filibuster in the way.[**I’m running to flip a** district from red to blue and gain a seat for Democrats in the House. I’m asking you to invest in my campaign with a donation today. Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40725692/325636912/-1402176493?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2YyOGY1Mi0zNTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSeBtK_v9dARDXaGaJXSi5RQwuihyeLjLBoFp3PTIRw=)**
In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

clean_body: Peter, Earlier this week, President Biden re-opened a crucial conversation that has animated Democrats since practically the moment the 2020 elections were called. Should the Senate keep or abolish the filibuster? As a proud progressive Democrat, you probably know where I stand. I wholeheartedly believe that we should leave the filibuster in the past where it belongs, and let the Senate rule by simple majority like the rest of the elements of our hallowed government. But here’s what’s different now. President Biden’s speech adds pressure and urgency to the debate over the filibuster. His support now gives Democrats more leverage to work with to persuade holdouts to vote for the proposed filibuster rule change. What’s more, President Biden has drawn a clear line in the sand, sending a strong message to those who refuse to vote for the change: history will not remember them well. = = Republicans and even some Democratic holdouts are supporting a rule that was part of the racist playbook used to defend segregation during Jim Crow. There’s a reason why the Founding Fathers did not support a 60-40 filibuster rule, even likening it to tyranny. While Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Mitt Romney would have you believe that minority rule in the Senate is a unique and important check in our system of governance, their party has itself done away with the filibuster when it suited them.The Republicans are playing a game of pure partisan politics. But the thing is, politics is not a game. Politics have a real, tangible impact on our lives. All of us are affected by policy every single day. And the filibuster is holding back so much important policy that would be life changing for millions of us. Voting rights expansion, anti-discrimination, equal rights for all genders, pro-immigration reform: all of it could be on the table without the filibuster. We have the power now, which means we have to grab this moment and do what is right. But we also must hold the majority. We have to ensure that we can execute a bold, progressive agenda without the filibuster in the way.= In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

**_Begin Original Message From Madison:_**

The right to cast a ballot is being threatened all across the country.

Too many attempts have been made by our elected leaders, including James Lankford, to keep Americans from accessing the ballot box. Even right now, he’s fighting to uphold the filibuster despite his criticisms, in order to block two key voting rights and anti-corruption bills from going through.

**The U.S. wants to be a beacon for democracy, but we have one of the lowest voter turnout rates among developed nations.**

No matter where we come from or our background, we deserve an equal say in who our leaders are, which is why I’m writing you.

clean_body: Turns out, everyone loves freedom Hi Peter, Do you know what these states have in common? They each have hypocritical Democrat leaders who made their way to vacation in Florida over the past year. Why? They know how poorly they’ve run their own states and need a place to hide. While we are a state that welcomes people from all walks of life, their radical policies and agenda need to be checked at the door. What we don’t need are a bunch of Democrats getting the wise idea to bring insanity to our state permanently. W e have to do everything we can to make sure we have the resources necessary to keep the far Left out of our state and out of the 7th Congressional District. Republicans have the opportunity to Take Back the House AND protect the Florida way of life, that means a better and brighter future for small businesses, a renewed focus on our children's education, and most of all – securing the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution. Sound good to you? It’s going to be a great year for Republicans in the House. With your help, we will make sure Florida has the best representation possible. Thank you, Erika Benfield Candidate for U.S. Congress, FL-07 | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far.
_Sponsored message_
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9iom33ak6ih8vnaagqhq973bbboejmcjlha8gv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9jmcoj4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpnd96ndet30kgahnns0f9m5lnt7tih804l1eug8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9jmcoj4c3h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbsl6g0lpoirfpfn7ouo7qhvq0l6mnbtupj5e3a0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9jmcoj4c3h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: for me, it's personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi Peter, I just wrapped up a meeting with some of my campaign staff, and as a valued member of this grassroots team, I wanted to give you an update about where things stand before our first fundraising deadline of the year.
Here's what you need to know: Mitch McConnell is hell-bent on taking back the Senate and just needs to flip one seat to pull it off – and his allies have more than $30 million to protect Republican incumbents and go on the offensive. Competing for every single seat matters immensely if Democrats hope to hang on to Senate control, **which is why our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) is absolutely crucial.**
You see, Sen. Grassley is more vulnerable than he's been in his entire, decades-long career. Earlier last year, polling showed 64% of likely Iowa voters didn't want to reelect him. NOW, new polling shows Sen. Grassley at record-low approval ratings. Democrats have never had a better opportunity to flip this seat blue – and as the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue, I have every intention of defeating Sen. Grassley and lifting up the voices of working families in the Senate.
But those tens of millions of dollars Mitch McConnell's allies have raised? They can tap into that campaign war chest at a moment's notice to destroy our momentum and protect Sen. Grassley. The Senate GOP campaign arm and Fox News have already attacked me. **We've got to build up resources to compete and show our strength, and to start the new year off right with our first mid-month fundraising deadline, we need to raise $15,000 over the next 48 hours to stay on track. We have a ways to go, so I would sure appreciate your support – seriously, whatever you can contribute – using this link: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40726354/325639375/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk537-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjRiYTYwNS0zNjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUERIFO9jZRnaq7fffAFQcwyodYnoErnCsy1FY8Mmas=)**
This is personal for me. Working families are _my_ family, and Sen. Grassley has failed us for far too long. It's time for a change and time for better leadership, which is exactly why I'm determined to win. Thanks for fighting by my side.

Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: A couple of points for yinz

body:

A couple of points for Derek —
* Our district is one of the most competitive races in the country, so Chris is working around the clock to bring bold, honest leadership to Congress. That means the roadmap to keeping our House majority goes right through Western Pennsylvania.

* Chris doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs, so our team relies on supporters like you to power our grassroots movement.

* We have a mid-month deadline that ends tonight, and we’re counting on a wave of grassroots donations to meet our goal before midnight.

Gosar refuses to accept the results of the 2020 presidential election.

He incited a deadly insurrection at our nation’s Capitol.

And he was censured and removed from all his committees after posting a video showing him killing Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

Paul Gosar has repeatedly shown he is not the representative that Arizona, or our nation, deserves – [_**which is why I’m running to replace him.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40726578/325640706/-363952900?refcode=BLU-DDC-20220115-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTUwODlkNi0zNzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ti0gOl0XK3O2A8kheH-MxzRleZlwXsDslUfq8osCH9s=)

body:
She's also risking our entire democracy for her own vanity, and for the benefit of Republicans and her corporate donors. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwPs-6MYXUPXpTtd-NMKXpZAbh7uJ8Ei8zkblgd0C6honidG_e_FFKIANvzN_0r6Usy9SlWy4Ub573UxxoP1ujcDXqGquHHvzgBnQceUsYeTnyDD7bGvMGc8pF15qLwVn3wyQZLAZUY5SeZw6iHbVsHJ_ycrYRNO3qTXf-Kp1L1KDNrYreJ9zGDZ655lbyrDP-VJ_wmfc7HCBNQzahn2FDkacUL7e90JrKl48UPrdGujll5AGtxHkdAkTS5Js_oQ7jPcR69vsxOjDYlNMv9y1ms8/3iq/P1IPOW7YTq21n_hN6b2WaA/h0/7xv6EVhzltOonHvGs57J5Oyo3hakJPJUbsDfWNriMNg)
Peter — **“The only consistency about Senator Sinema's roles and positions is inconsistency.”** That's what Arizona Rep. Ruben Gallego said on CNN yesterday when asked about Kyrsten Sinema's stance on filibuster reform. Gallego noted that Sinema backed the filibuster exception for debt limits when convenient to Wall Street, but hews to "ancient principles" when it comes to voting rights — all while continuing to evade her own constituents. **[But Kyrsten Sinema is not just inconsistent and absent to Arizonans. She's also risking our entire democracy for her own vanity, and for the benefit of Republicans and her corporate donors. We can't take this lightly — and we need to lay the groundwork to primary her NOW. Can you please rush a $3 donation today to help us out?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS6rjvWxyDBeg-PHXyiOXP_mirF7cPoFevKklgtFH4ZS5wah-ucGvTDx2z-0XWHpTufExBBP3vdLXdqNw_YMt8Umv0XgoOj-x-jTmgmP1ppQ7b_94O5_pl7oUwgNx0RoyZse3Gmb6DEmn2gH-VbjWqmC5UkFZX1_fd4KEAAybDOCKkbk99BVPQaYGmCKiJqE2plHO_S-mWie-P6V-BCRZweG-6kq1lT4fiME_bSxUfVPuPnYFx6AJmMV0HEjxn_8EFPE-EdN8ygbuJpyNtJoIZjkH6k9zYWroyVekFaL15l0W9gp5f90keC47LxKb9b_2wgieRGUOwXMpWRdka3DZVOKmKluTr1Ig0IwCZz8fi0lY/3iq/P1IPOW7YTq21n_hN6b2WaA/h1/xDcD9RvQS3vb9KN67p6gV6qOkr89bL73TxAUVfyWwvo)** **[Contribute $3](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS6rjvWxyDBeg-PHXyiOXP_mirF7cPoFevKklgtFH4ZS7jcRMhIjo4V7aPhrSpa7lyofx0iDRMQI2CvO5fhBj9pZM1DSr8bw-MLPHelCsD-GgkCsICl--Qo648JEY4jYGWHVLfRK3Vcq1W9GTo0H7k9W5QhKEe8WK2tvAHbVbDTX5vP-Px32i09ctcJSNWfmTlJcJHmg9xgB0uDR9Mqa8m120dM14Af_E0vWYk0WXRuLU3V4A9AyKwrXuHttNHvxMB7Ten_idlGHHPY_x6AGspcR8s0GLkEEYsreFcSPTZn10ItUFDJhF9nU9ChRFpJ_Za07gGZWVj3iimBg7HoqqgK5w3M0vZ8HvTD9Y0XbMVyxk/3iq/P1IPOW7YTq21n_hN6b2WaA/h2/WNelVgxSHM6b-ZJ3fcJ0IqtT2YegA5ijDLdfKOmt3kM)** Unfortunately, because of Kyrsten Sinema, voting rights might be doomed to fail. But the silver lining in all of this is that _we can actually beat her._ The polling is largely in our favor, showing that Kyrsten Sinema is vulnerable. Arizona voters overwhelmingly support the Biden agenda, and overwhelmingly support lawmakers who support the Biden agenda — which Sinema is not. But here's the catch: **we have to start organizing right now.** For the last few months, we've been doing the critical work of supporting grassroots organizing: putting money into the groups with boots on the ground that are doing the work, and doing the personal outreach, to ensure we can _win._ **[Peter, our work to power grassroots organizing in Arizona to build the infrastructure to oust and primary Sinema has never been so urgent. If we use this moment to build grassroots momentum behind a successful primary challenge — we can and will oust Sinema from the Senate. clean_body: She's also risking our entire democracy for her own vanity, and for the benefit of Republicans and her corporate donors. | | | Peter — “The only consistency about Senator Sinema's roles and positions is inconsistency.” That's what Arizona Rep. Ruben Gallego said on CNN yesterday when asked about Kyrsten Sinema's stance on filibuster reform. Gallego noted that Sinema backed the filibuster exception for debt limits when convenient to Wall Street, but hews to "ancient principles" when it comes to voting rights — all while continuing to evade her own constituents. Unfortunately, because of Kyrsten Sinema, voting rights might be doomed to fail. But the silver lining in all of this is that we can actually beat her. The polling is largely in our favor, showing that Kyrsten Sinema is vulnerable. Arizona voters overwhelmingly support the Biden agenda, and overwhelmingly support lawmakers who support the Biden agenda — which Sinema is not. But here's the catch: we have to start organizing right now. For the last few months, we've been doing the critical work of supporting grassroots organizing: putting money into the groups with boots on the ground that are doing the work, and doing the personal outreach, to ensure we can win. body:
If I can be honest, no one thought we would be here—but here we stand. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40726820/325643105/1002998528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTQzN2I2MC0zZDc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFBo2-pE7m-XKbF6sNCBnhzLoFuZBazLdetba9-iQZw=&emci=0b558c9b-3676-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ce437b60-3d76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12740612) | Hi, team. We are just a few hours away from our first financial disclosure deadline! The team let me know we’re closing in on our ambitious fundraising goal as we close this reporting period. That’s great news! The team and I are grateful for the outpouring of support we’re seeing from every part of the state. Folks are ready for a change — and they’re stepping up to make it happen. [If we can bring in another $2,598 online in the next few hours, w](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40726821/325643106/1590739027?refcode2=ce437b60-3d76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTQzN2I2MC0zZDc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFBo2-pE7m-XKbF6sNCBnhzLoFuZBazLdetba9-iQZw=)[e’ll meet our online fundraising goal. And that will mean our campaign will make a solid showing on the first financial disclosure.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40726822/325643107/1590739027?refcode2=ce437b60-3d76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTQzN2I2MC0zZDc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFBo2-pE7m-XKbF6sNCBnhzLoFuZBazLdetba9-iQZw=) **In December, the Tennesee Lookout said that our candidacy was the one to watch in 2022. If I can be honest, no one thought we would be here—but here we stand. We are here because of you and the folks across the state who believe we need a different type of candidate who will run a different type of race—fighting for equity, affordable and accessible healthcare, fully funded public education, increasing****teacher pay, and establishing a living wage. I will do just that.** The team has generated a secure link for you to use. This will ensure your donation goes through before midnight and gives us the push we need. **Here’s the link:[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40726823/325643108/784476591?refcode=E13223-20211231-EOM4-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTQzN2I2MC0zZDc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFBo2-pE7m-XKbF6sNCBnhzLoFuZBazLdetba9-iQZw=)** With your support, I know we will reach our goal. I appreciate it. Peace and Blessings.
JB

The team and I are grateful for the outpouring of support we’re seeing from every part of the state. Folks are ready for a change — and they’re stepping up to make it happen. = In December, the Tennesee Lookout said that our candidacy was the one to watch in 2022. We are here because of you and the folks across the state who believe we need a different type of candidate who will run a different type of race—fighting for equity, affordable and accessible healthcare, fully funded public education, increasingteacher pay, and establishing a living wage. name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: We have the chance to ensure fair congressional maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Ohio Democrats, Republicans' attempts at drawing legislative maps in their favor has been temporarily halted. Earlier this week the Ohio Supreme Court ruled that the preliminary map of Ohio's legislative districts was unconstitutional.

The maps Ohio Republicans presented would have disenfranchised voters across the state -- especially Black and brown voters -- and they've even admitted that they didn't take racial demographics or the Voting Rights Act into account when drawing their maps.

This is a huge win for us as the redistricting commission reconvenes to redraw the maps. But we have to make sure we keep up the pressure to ensure the new maps are fair for every voter. It won't be easy, Republicans have plenty of tricks up their sleeves to keep the maps leaning in their favor.

We're fighting back and demanding the redistricting commission commits to creating fair maps, but we need your help. [**Will you help us protect Ohio's congressional maps with a donation of just $3 or more today to ensure we hit our $7,000 mid-month goal before tomorrow's deadline? Every dollar helps us end the political games Ohio Republicans are playing.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40726999/325644439/1636697581?refcode=em22_220115_mm3_fnd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220115_mm3_fnd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTZkZTNiNC0zZDc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N3f_q0M8B_FlawkuWkhQ18f42JHXcKRBXXqW1K54eb8=)

We won't lie, this will be an uphill battle: Republicans will always put their own interests above the interests of hardworking Ohioans. But we're not going to stand by silently as the Ohioans we serve are betrayed.

The future of our state and the future of our nation is at stake -- the majority in Congress will come down to Ohio. While Republicans look out for themselves, we're looking out for working Ohioans. And I hope we can count on your support in this fight.

[**Chip in $3 or more right now to help us hit our mid-month goal, fight for fair maps, and stop Ohio Republicans from gerrymandering the state in their favor.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40727005/325644451/1636697581?refcode=em22_220115_mm3_fnd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220115_mm3_fnd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTZkZTNiNC0zZDc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N3f_q0M8B_FlawkuWkhQ18f42JHXcKRBXXqW1K54eb8=)

Thank you,

Liz
Liz Walters
Team ODP

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? name: Tim
subject: many hands make light work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2034%2E3611125%2Ei9HL14 ][IMG]

Folks—

When I was growing up, whether we were cooking Sunday dinner (pasta with
homemade sauce, of course) or doing yard work, my mom would always tell
us: many hands make light work.

We usually had a lot of hands to help us get by because that’s what
community is about—everyone pitching in, doing their part, no matter how
small, to get the job done.

That’s how I’ve legislated, raised my kids, and how I’m running this
campaign. The Senate majority will come down to what happens here in Ohio,
so we need many, many hands.

We’re counting on thousands of grassroots donors like you to help us flip
this seat blue. Together, we can fight back against the dark-money attacks
and overcome a mountain of GOP spending.

The truth is, if everyone reading this chipped in just $5, we’d blow our
$35,000 mid-month fundraising goal out of the water.

Folks, I’m counting on you to step up and join our grassroots
army. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6465?t=1007&akid=2034%2E3611125%2Ei9HL14 ]We only have until midnight tonight to meet this goal and we
still need to raise $9,754. Can you chip in $5 before the clock runs out?

—Tim

[ ]We only have until midnight tonight to meet this goal and we still need to raise $9,754. Can you chip in $5 before the clock runs out? [ ]Donate $5 [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount Together we’ll flip Ohio blue! —Tim [ ]Tim Headshot [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40727345/325647896/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmZlZTdlNC00MTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z11829KVSOxBBos5p0Pmf3sG1ZpA6hooVcxXKsO1VAc=&emci=fb2fd759-b474-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=82fee7e4-4176-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8780864) I've spent my life fighting for working families and underserved communities. **My goal has always been to stand up for people who need it most.

** That's why I want to hear from YOU as I start my campaign for the California State Assembly. **
**[**Will you take a minute to fill our my survey and let me know what issues you care about most?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40727346/325647897/-302027590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmZlZTdlNC00MTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z11829KVSOxBBos5p0Pmf3sG1ZpA6hooVcxXKsO1VAc=&emci=fb2fd759-b474-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=82fee7e4-4176-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8780864) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40727347/325647898/-302027590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmZlZTdlNC00MTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z11829KVSOxBBos5p0Pmf3sG1ZpA6hooVcxXKsO1VAc=&emci=fb2fd759-b474-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=82fee7e4-4176-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8780864) Too often, wealthy corporations and Big Money donors control our political conversations, while marginalized communities go unheard.

I'm committed to changing that. **In the Assembly, my first priority will be my constituents.**
**
**[**So I want to hear from you as I shape my political agenda! What issues are your top priority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40727348/325647899/-302027590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmZlZTdlNC00MTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z11829KVSOxBBos5p0Pmf3sG1ZpA6hooVcxXKsO1VAc=&emci=fb2fd759-b474-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=82fee7e4-4176-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8780864) Thank you for taking the time to answer! _\-- Georgette_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40727349/325647900/-169587575?refcode=X_011522_IssueSurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmZlZTdlNC00MTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z11829KVSOxBBos5p0Pmf3sG1ZpA6hooVcxXKsO1VAc=) Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Assembly 2022, #1443281 Georgette Gómez

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I am scouting my team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you're with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=876f39e9e0674a5cbaccade18b2297b5&_e=6GtbQNqEVV67BfD-v1aDJOR3RY9-nfETOBblr_Lgsb92XwSIt30Ma3lMZIBgGrBEaCfidEv6Z1f9ce8ghkms-60MwsslL2XOJsCh9D5T2ypIvKmVmXuB1ZH26XjUIlMHJJLumjn0w_wSK5HT9moVzLzqPSHED8QE5RKHPixVKPp45iROJUkyOIfcIk4VuNAqdKHVHhd55ytXJpkjkEu42r3d3efsD0bZxbGs_G4cRckxqbynM8o9YTgxfccMRk-Ds7QNm2tjQo7Vn1TDEG_z_jXIvwALGVm7RGAyP4TAUEwHnjIgmomPyV9QqZ3iMY7uNRqCbG1iuwC4ekXJ5-S5EshplI_0Ps2gtDcbqQC_0JBguKvkjf0vQOwN7dV3sfaE1eQQb-SlGd-p73AeMVkUqXSWuW_--mZUasHLa4VWIjTyfuaZ-dFU_uYFYUnz8I6UhGF-pLI1GB3EuYEOApzOlQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I've been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow American, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=876f39e9e0674a5cbaccade18b2297b5&_e=6GtbQNqEVV67BfD-v1aDJOR3RY9-nfETOBblr_Lgsb92XwSIt30Ma3lMZIBgGrBEaCfidEv6Z1f9ce8ghkms-60MwsslL2XOJsCh9D5T2ypIvKmVmXuB1ZH26XjUIlMHJJLumjn0w_wSK5HT9moVzLzqPSHED8QE5RKHPixVKPp45iROJUkyOIfcIk4VuNAqdKHVHhd55ytXJpkjkEu42r3d3efsD0bZxbGs_G4cRckxqbynM8o9YTgxfccMRk-DsnCVJyFwbf55kCTRdP9hZwVfjJY3AmD9D_YJ27rEObXSPvyg1FHxPJabsnEfC46g3A_qltxcPYQ6Dim5WjIwi-rsyA6JC85CSd9DxZ_x6DwHLNtrqKbhVBcqbB__VD9LnQ_Tdtsza9rL5NpVyRI8i3K1OyOKTRRDyy_GqWftgyofWPefIz7m0g91eYy7hRkK8Wu3jmq5Fz5adSF66PXAIg%3D%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=876f39e9e0674a5cbaccade18b2297b5&_e=6GtbQNqEVV67BfD-v1aDJOR3RY9-nfETOBblr_Lgsb92XwSIt30Ma3lMZIBgGrBEaCfidEv6Z1f9ce8ghkms-60MwsslL2XOJsCh9D5T2ypIvKmVmXuB1ZH26XjUIlMHJJLumjn0w_wSK5HT9moVzLzqPSHED8QE5RKHPixVKPp45iROJUkyOIfcIk4VuNAqdKHVHhd55ytXJpkjkEu42r3d3efsD0bZxbGs_G4cRckxqbynM8o9YTgxfccMRk-DnGOw83MMsk1T08IA93SDJByUaHPDC2gcIMT_8mWG3hiSqC_UvpwLXx9oNBT5FBJYNdcOQcjvP2ZZYgRqvwq4OrkGDtOzuZnThF8m2jtOcVDCN0ZPhSptbl1Ecoi7CL0HJrm2bk6kV39UBu_xf9L-acoFLH9iFomsIBZK4zFJzDnal4Ln7pgdiHPUWb4sJhhaqPnntpZt4BIBJC6KU3f3jg%3D%3D)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He's a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that's come across his desk in Washington.

He's pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Fellow American. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=876f39e9e0674a5cbaccade18b2297b5&_e=6GtbQNqEVV67BfD-v1aDJOR3RY9-nfETOBblr_Lgsb92XwSIt30Ma3lMZIBgGrBEaCfidEv6Z1f9ce8ghkms-60MwsslL2XOJsCh9D5T2ypIvKmVmXuB1ZH26XjUIlMHJJLumjn0w_wSK5HT9moVzLzqPSHED8QE5RKHPixVKPp45iROJUkyOIfcIk4VuNAqdKHVHhd55ytXJpkjkEu42r3d3efsD0bZxbGs_G4cRckxqbynM8o9YTgxfccMRk-Drk79AFIm0RYSKmyzL17RO8gMafNKGpOuEjq4_78UOeal1neN4SFQaJEGHQTezYjyjxJhWVC64Ij59XqclEIuYE6y6CFgosy91tsScPUSoyfIehz3Ugolv55dlfNpNtFpnziO8Jx3K6UQ0wFZ3GWe_yrUVfvNAu3OhuJ9EhnR2efKOYH01hXB31aEKNhR8_Ob-z2OO2Fro0mVQuECrKahWQ%3D%3D) **

I've been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I've ever been a part of. Fellow American, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you'll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

clean_body: If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you're with me. Join Team Herschel today! | Fellow American, I've been on a lot of teams. From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, I know what makes a good teammate. We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win. Fellow American, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia. I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He's a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that's come across his desk in Washington. He's pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government. This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. Georgians deserve better.America deserves better. As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Fellow American. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team. I've been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I've ever been a part of. Fellow American, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you'll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Team -

Happy New Year from me to you!

The campaign is in full swing and we will be visiting all over the district in the coming weeks! We had our first volunteer call on Thursday and we have a meet and greet coming up on Monday at Pizza Chef in Easton. We will be hosting more meet and greets as well down the road so please be on the lookout for those invites as they come along.

If you are interested in joining our team, please sign up at [https://lisaschellerpa.com/volunteerpa/](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=d482e5409b8b4baf9707026bed67a4de&_e=B1HRwien1WYNpHT5L57PqrrmiDsRxpu9Zb8JSUopIf7Tlt9dIl2LewrRy2AYT_liUICs4WrX6-IB6EkdK3bB8BLyoQ3xwxZdtiR5zyGaqNI2or_hGvQCx8ib5hVAjdQ7FMJywhEq87kdvFMWAVnBv6_CxG8PJP9EqjH0eRblE5N7sgUXN8bvrjfrcqj1i8pnaN6DFGfMvFpDx_q9a3GnIi-XiVKaHZg9c6Rl54ei0afd4x_B0RCuXWyoKKAOiE9HYjKt2A4zkxolSamwLWKlJ0mPqi8u9xxP616RWHUuPFI%3D) and we will get you on our team!

We will also need help with petitions. To get on the ballot in Pennsylvania, we will need over 1,000 petition signatures in a short amount of time. If you would like to circulate a petition or even host a petition party, please reach out to Billy@schellerforcongress.com so that we can set up a date with you!

Health and safety to you and your family!

-Lisa
[](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=d482e5409b8b4baf9707026bed67a4de&_e=B1HRwien1WYNpHT5L57PqpnsJF1zaEj7vuzkL2yy9YyFz6R5x21Mi5gtmU0dDZCjpEoXEUlSothBcjeSE60H8Ub2gM3TcthPcjPWE-pyeFLUPK2NcPSa_WTtUDJ09RZQ5KrGkU0TYV0N7TGw-BeXbFYxYaRsKyOBw-Ty6KwM2P2FXTcbpYdqQivpv3W28Pygqb9sJanzef6BRNUpIJ12LTiJnvkxExyIYJuVxyxkQ1TjC6RduNtVBPrs7UiZ6JGAh8ZC4_ft-GaGD5EpmGvumji8Ggz02ZPURDPjRA1rg8dFNJ39fQumm9kMCdxO8yYMZGD-QqWNqnppi2jQc53iiA%3D%3D)
|
---
**Empty Shelves **

People from all over the Lehigh Valley have been sending me photos from empty stores showing bare shelves. Susan Wild thinks "[there’s a false narrative in many cases about supply chain shortages, gas prices or whatever](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=d482e5409b8b4baf9707026bed67a4de&_e=B1HRwien1WYNpHT5L57Pqj1BW8UZrGXvaC-fSTCUKo4WsuWJRhw8Q0_vLOdlPGOo56fBE4ijyKiBS25lnDPyS98TDogEoB9gLfqQCEY88tx-y9b6xEGxy1KziWxt0snTnlDobeRgZEEAK2dMEC7h4FqiZCizoK3p-j_8mMCm9yK2XNQdCzbSLulpBMIbqCZ59eYsGG7qKiU7PEIWZV5De8Qg-EvOlCey1TcY_HOQzxyKrZAyWNU2v5mj9wQ1nITIkxPcJ3LnSDXZnKfZH08M7lDp65PRjPSdv0EHo8VSlWaxEvtLjgvmUpTq57mvFXDQrAYorSVNQ5umTrdtEGOAfQ%3D%3D).” Does she not know what is going on in her own district? How can she solve a problem that she can't recognize?

Join me and let's fix this.

|
---
**Ghost Flights into Allentown & Our Southern Border**

The recent news reports of flights with illegal immigrants on board being sent to Lehigh Valley International Airport by the Biden Administration concerns me on multiple levels. These flights were conducted in complete secrecy and under the cover of darkness. We were not given any public notification because they hoped that no one would notice.

Where is Susan Wild on this issue? Her record on illegal immigration speaks for itself. She has cast votes in Congress against requiring DHS to test migrants for COVID before they are released into our communities, against ensuring Customs & Border Protection is appropriately staffed, against making investments in border security technology, and against fully protecting our Southern Border.

This issue is no longer thousands of miles away; it is right in our backyard. It is time we elect someone who puts the safety of those in the Lehigh Valley first. Join me, and let's do just that.

[ | |

clean_body: Happy New Year from me to you! The campaign is in full swing and we will be visiting all over the district in the coming weeks! We had our firs Scheller for Congress Newsletter | | | ---|--- Team - Happy New Year from me to you! The campaign is in full swing and we will be visiting all over the district in the coming weeks! We had our first volunteer call on Thursday and we have a meet and greet coming up on Monday at Pizza Chef in Easton. We will be hosting more meet and greets as well down the road so please be on the lookout for those invites as they come along. If you are interested in joining our team, please sign up at and we will get you on our team! We will also need help with petitions. To get on the ballot in Pennsylvania, we will need over 1,000 petition signatures in a short amount of time. If you would like to circulate a petition or even host a petition party, please reach out to Billy@schellerforcongress.com so that we can set up a date with you! Health and safety to you and your family! -Lisa | Empty Shelves People from all over the Lehigh Valley have been sending me photos from empty stores showing bare shelves. Susan Wild thinks ".” Does she not know what is going on in her own district? How can she solve a problem that she can't recognize? Join me and let's fix this. | Ghost Flights into Allentown & Our Southern Border The recent news reports of flights with illegal immigrants on board being sent to Lehigh Valley International Airport by the Biden Administration concerns me on multiple levels. These flights were conducted in complete secrecy and under the cover of darkness. We were not given any public notification because they hoped that no one would notice. Where is Susan Wild on this issue? Her record on illegal immigration speaks for itself. She has cast votes in Congress against requiring DHS to test migrants for COVID before they are released into our communities, against ensuring Customs & Border Protection is appropriately staffed, against making investments in border security technology, and against fully protecting our Southern Border. This issue is no longer thousands of miles away; it is right in our backyard. It is time we elect someone who puts the safety of those in the Lehigh Valley first. Join me, and let's do just that. | Sit Down with Scheller! Our second sit down with Scheller features Joe Ruffino from Biaggio's in South Whitehall! | Photos from the Campaign! | | As always, be sure to keep an eye out for future updates from the campaign and future events! Onward to victory, Team Scheller | Check out our Social Media Pages! | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

I grew up in a small working class town here in California.

Everyone knew one another. My dad was a teacher, and my mom was a secretary. They worked hard, but always made time for family.

At first, my parents couldn't afford to send me to a university -- so I started at a community college instead. I paid my way through school working at a lunch counter.

**For me, hard work paid off. But after 20 years of teaching students, it's clear that our opportunities to get ahead are being cut short by politicians like Kevin McCarthy.**

Kevin has represented us for nearly 15 years with absolutely NOTHING to show for it except being a lapdog to Trump and his wealthy donors.

I hear stories every day from my kiddos and their parents about the challenges they face -- recovering from COVID-19, the lack of affordable health care, and struggling businesses.

Heck, my family has had our fair share of struggles too, but like many families here in the Central Valley, you just learn to deal.

It's unacceptable that our current representative is doing so much to hurt our community. Despite the odds, we must do something about it -- that's why I'm stepping up to run for Congress and why I'm asking:

**[We're coming up $5,301 short of our weekly goal to DEFEAT Kevin McCarthy. That means we need to see A TON of supporters chip in a grassroots donation. Can you kick in $3 today to help us meet the mark?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40727443/325648246/-217444029?refcode=em-1.15.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2RhZmVjYy00Mjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fQsMdQTiypzv9dy90_xKe2t6PaILib4g4DxW9P5PmwY=)**

body:
Last time Trump was here, he told his supporters that “Taking back America begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the Senate.”
#

Friends —
I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford — before Donald Trump takes the stage at his Arizona rally later tonight.
Here’s the truth:
Last time Trump was here, he told his supporters that “Taking back America begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the Senate.” What he’ll say this time is anybody’s guess...
But tonight’s visit also happens to coincide with the end of our mid-month fundraising drive, and we still need A LOT more donations to reach our goals.
So, please. Trump may be in town. Our opponents may have super PACs and outside groups spending millions of dollars in attack ads against us, but we have each other. And that’s how we’ll win.
So, I’m humbly asking:

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: From Your Capitol - January 15, 2022
body:
From Your Capitol - January 15, 2022
---
| | | | |
---
**From Your Capitol - January 15, 2022**
| | |
---
| |
---
| | The Mississippi House of Representatives took two crucial votes this week. Both votes were taken within 24 hours of the bills being introduced and quickly rushed through committee Tuesday evening. The Mississippi Tax Freedom Act of 2022 (294 pages long) was the first bill up for a vote and passed with 97 yes votes (primarily Republicans) and 25 representatives voting no, present, or absent. This bill is a marketed improvement from the bill introduced last year and does utilize an economic growth formula to reduce the state’s personal income tax in the long term, but still has issues that should be worked out before the final passage, including a sales tax increase from the now 7 percent general sales tax to 8.5 percent sales tax. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus (MFC) members supported this bill with a unanimous decision among its members, in order to keep the bill alive so that amendments and changes can be made along the way to continue to strengthen the bill and provide a pay raise for all Mississippians through a reduction in the overall tax burden of the state. The Strategically Accelerating the Recruitment and Retention of Teachers (START) Act of 2022 (18 pages long) was the second bill up for a vote and passed with 114 yes votes which included yes votes from all Democrat representatives and no votes only coming from all five MFC members and one other Republican representative. This bill requires an increase in the state’s tax burden in the amount of approximately $258 million for meritless teacher pay raises (including additional retirement benefits), accounting for roughly $4,000 – $6,000 in additional salary benefits for all certified K-12 teachers in the Mississippi public school system. This pay increase makes Mississippi have the highest teacher pay in the southeast when Mississippi was already 4th out of the nine southern states as compared to median household income. Prior to this bill, teachers in Mississippi were already making 8.6% higher than the average Mississippi worker. This pay increase comes at a time when our law enforcement officers across the state are leaving their jobs due to low pay, often making less than $30,000 per year, and corrections officers oven making as little as $18/hour. With the income tax elimination bill being passed just moments before the teacher pay raise bill, the Mississippi House of Representatives passed a 1.5 percent increase in general sales tax, that will negatively affect all Mississippians. If the corresponding $258 million annually recurring teacher pay raise was utilized in a more financially responsible way, the sales tax increase required to eliminate the state individual income tax could have been 0.5 percent lower, thereby only requiring a one (1) percent general sales tax increase. Utilizing the funds in this manner, would be a more fiscally sound policy that would provide all Mississippians with a raise. There are approximately 33,000 public school teachers in the state of Mississippi, accounting for 1 percent of all Mississippians. Therefore, the tax burden of $258 million from this bill falls on the shoulders of all Mississippians in the form of 0.5 percent general sales tax increase to benefit only one (1) percent of Mississippians, whereas a corresponding reduction in personal income tax would benefit 100 percent of working Mississippians. During a brief debate, MFC member Rep. Brady Williamson asked, “Are these pay increases tied to performance in the classroom?” for which the Education Committee Chairman Richard Bennet indicated that all teachers would receive the raise, remarking “Even the worst of them.” Rep. Williamson also asked regarding the local school district supplement, “May, possibly, [a local school district] change what they pay in their supplement?” for which Chairman Bennet replied, “They can increase it, but they can’t decrease it.” Based on the Chairman’s response the state, through this bill, now seeks to control a school district’s supplement pay amount for teachers preventing them from lowering the supplement during any times of economic downturn. Local school districts should be very concerned about the bill increasing state control over local school districts. MFC Chairman Steve Hopkins released a statement on Facebook prior to the votes saying, “I have a passion for teachers, my wife is a teacher, both of my daughters and my daughter in-law. My sister Tracy was a teacher and my sister Cindy was a teacher’s assistant... I could be selfish and do what’s best for my household and vote for a $4,000 raise or I could vote no and stand strong for all Mississippians... I want an income tax elimination, grocery tax cut and car tag cut that gives all Mississippians thousands of dollars of extra income.” The Mississippi Center for Public Policy, the state’s preeminent conservative think tank, ranked the teacher’s pay bill as a bill that erodes liberty with the statement, “After all costs are calculated, this is an extra $258 million dollars in new spending. After careful consideration, we have marked this as a bad bill.” The Mississippi Legislature has been presented with a unique opportunity at a time with the state coffers larger than they have ever been in history, to use sound fiscal policies to lower the tax burden of all Mississippi workers through individual income tax elimination, without simply raising taxes in another manner. The Legislature will not be able to make historic tax cuts that will benefit all Mississippians if the politicians in Jackson continue to increase the size and scope of our state’s tax burden, with all Mississippians being on the hook. Putting more money in the pockets of all Mississippians through tax cuts will grow the economy and present sound fiscal opportunities to give teachers adequate merit-based salary increases. **On Tuesday January 11, I joined Mike Madison to discuss the 2022 legislative session and the goals of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus.**
****
---

name: LBR (personal)
subject: Hi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
I’m going to keep this brief.

We’re just hours away from reaching our first fundraising deadline of the election year. My team just told me that if 50 people chip in just a few bucks, we could hit our goal and be fully prepared for whatever 2022 has to offer.

I told them my grassroots team would step up and close that gap. So, can I count on you to make a donation to this campaign before we reach our first fundraising deadline at midnight tonight?

You can use this link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-jan22

Thank you,

LBR

Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: 🔥 heating up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This race is heating up.
#
Derek, _a lot_ happened in PA this past week.
Let’s recap:
❌ GOP multi-millionaire David McCormick officially launched his U.S. Senate campaign, bringing Trump staffers Stephen Miller and Hope Hicks with him
❌ Republicans and their super PACs have already spent more than $11.4 million on TV and radio ads
❌ Dr. Oz officially started campaigning, dropping over $4 million on TV ads
This all goes to show that it’s officially 2022, and the race to win Pennsylvania + save our Democratic majority is heating up. 🔥
**But right now, we’re faced with our first fundraising deadline of the year and we need your help!**
**[Derek, we need to raise $20,000 from our online donors before tomorrow night if we’re going to keep up with our GOP opponents + their super PACs. Can you make your first donation of 2022 today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40839?refcode=ema20220115-4200&t=1&akid=4200%2E434096%2ErBR3hQ)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40839?refcode=em20220115-4200&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4200%2E434096%2ErBR3hQ)**
With your help, we’ll be able to meet this goal and show our GOP opponents that our campaign can handle the heat. 😎
– Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220115-4200-footer&t=21&refcode2=4200_434096_rBR3hQ&akid=4200%2E434096%2ErBR3hQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=4200%2E434096%2ErBR3hQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=4200%2E434096%2ErBR3hQ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: URGENT Update From Mike Lindell That He Wants Me To Share With You
body:
URGENT Update From Mike Lindell: I spent this weekend in Phoenix, Arizona at the Re-Awaken America Tour event and I had some incredible conversations
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1768.1.ad5c32a41ed4d176e531cdbbd67fa83a) |
---
## URGENT Update From Mike Lindell:
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1769.1.4e535f29520e5909ebc40df29c2e3d62) www.MyPillow.com
---
I spent this weekend in _Phoenix, Arizona_ at the **Re-Awaken America Tour** event and I had some incredible conversations with many great heroes such as **Eric Trump** , **General Michael Flynn** and **Mike Lindell**.
_Mike Lindell_ wanted me to specifically let you know how grateful he is for the support great Americans like you have shown him and [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1770.1.12ef21aa25394a4b61b789d27ac5f6e8) over the last year in this fight to #SaveAmerica.
Right now, the Patriot movement is under attack, and we must stand **UNITED**! We have to recognize this is a fight between good and evil.
**Mike Lindell** has just found out that his bank, Minnesota Bank & Trust, has **cancelled the accounts of his business and his charities**.
This is UNBELIEVABLE!
We need to **support Mike in this fight**.
We must use our **3 Ts** to fight back:
1\. **Time** \- Attend events with other like-minded Patriots such as the Re-Awaken Tour (Ohio in February, San Diego in March. Get more info at www.timetofreeamerica.com )
2\. **Talent** \- Use the gifts and abilities that God has given you to contribute to saving of America. _America needs you_!
3\. **Treasure** \- We must stop funding Deep State companies and start funing America First companies. Every dollar we spend is a bullet in this war.
**If we will fight, we will win.**
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1771.1.0b283dd4f1b63a8140ff600341c5697b), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1772.1.7b0ebff0075f630adbc5956603aebcb2).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1773.1.9a6e918d5955367ec94c31a2e368ae43) and look at all of the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1774.1.59f2dd0fa9d2bfb4ea2b4c9ae674c094)
Kendra and I love all of our [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1775.1.39d19eb3d6ccca8d9cfe807aee08ceb2) products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too...
Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet and greet in 2022, that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma and would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet & greet or a fundraiser please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1776.1.5e057949cf5ce97a686d3deec7f20e9f), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1777.1.6f7c45dd8e40ad2a27d5b1a6373f5cdf), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1778.1.ef72cf1b6ec4bdf9f9ca23b5ea60618c), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1779.1.e6823eb40c50ff315e8a525914bc5ed5), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1780.1.d7116b1e01b425a1914d1da2dfc5b5d0)).
| | [ Click Here To Help Save America ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2806407.1781.1.9949f7f25fea7df513341047921b199a)
---

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Yesterday’s monumental ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
The Ohio Supreme Court threw out the Congressional map, but our district’s future is still in question. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux5rx5t0ymMjZ-dbA3rUkSd-Z7SB_Qw2akkWywJ-A1SejnK0KX6ZUuNk26aMWAf7l2Fx9gLmCI_IIkHhkikrmNkNmeblFEo-wWn7_zWkqGJ0ZFaK-uEvLpv-p9TKpzM2bwFAL2L9lNUNj6jQ8f3VAZ9kDNTJ2wt7vS240cu7_UI0KfT-hiFupFMKvCsfo9VXux_DvmMHj8uDvXoieePTuh4QblO7JqiZPbMWHImkhYo25rHBZk6t81wzPfxTBdr4rpmndLqTgXteiR9WpDrDwmP7pw-ci_b-AWrGOTGDuXBR-f_hgvfoDFX2W1qdMgL-f9J3Eu0abOGdL-woUl529ErWBJwB5bNAHVqFjprxn8A2hC-fzCKaVJoHDcV2uA0iK4g/3iq/zu4PeohiT4aOJSbN-qGE1g/h0/vciRjP_dNmAnKQWneTEF53NcXvyHQaTWKkufvvqbkyM)

| | Team,

Yesterday, the Ohio Supreme Court struck down the blatantly gerrymandered Congressional maps in a 4-3 ruling. Now, the state legislature has **30 days** to come up with a **new, more just map.**

In a swing state that elects both Republicans and Democrats, the idea that Congressional maps favoring Republicans in **12 out of 15 districts** is an affront to the Constitution and to the people who yearn for _responsible, effective governance_.

**Democracy itself is on the line** \- and the State Legislature must abide by the law of the land, put an end to partisan hackery, and deliver districts that properly _represent the people and communities of Ohio_.

Yesterday’s decision offers a glimmer of hope that our institutions will **safeguard the will of the people** , as the founders intended. I commend the Ohio Supreme Court for their ruling and cautiously await the new map from the state legislature.

**[Team, the Supreme Court did the right thing yesterday, but we are still in a fight against the gerrymandering and partisan schemes that threaten our democracy. I will always amplify the voice of the people, but I need you shouting with me. Will you contribute $15 to my campaign right now to help us keep winning these crucial victories?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux5rx5t0ymMjZ-dbA3rUkSd-Z7SB_Qw2akkWywJ-A1SejnK0KX6ZUuNk26aMWAf7l2EEY9w4KFu8dEfWbR_qgGbUBtjSDJJCTRsHuvOorXG2jdbHBbUHIHDfmc0THdmHtw9guaWsVFA3zZWRo-C80ELZhoBNeZeaGbiEnmEvr2acEBuswSJg9kY4GZ9EAtFCjiY9XmbKhcT77r82kv3bZo6KAntAwP_4SecKh6DUWdMAYlWWgv5L6yy5ml-BjRi_WvyWkAnPZu0_43_F9iGVsO2D6siLRK6AZB5bIhbHJSa4yZOTPoY0MpvQcXpzg83139twgkKd5c2PAQYfKXxIao3S9Upyou9cYvawItfJIXN8OD-1J0PfPSHYB3aJbmyLpibGKNzR0OqaAg0Dh0EgZ6Ec/3iq/zu4PeohiT4aOJSbN-qGE1g/h1/dZT3oOCQ1r_02hQerYZtb1meGjZs5aJoMxDziE_PUfA)**

clean_body: The Ohio Supreme Court threw out the Congressional map, but our district’s future is still in question. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team, Yesterday, the Ohio Supreme Court struck down the blatantly gerrymandered Congressional maps in a 4-3 ruling. Now, the state legislature has 30 days to come up with a new, more just map. In a swing state that elects both Republicans and Democrats, the idea that Congressional maps favoring Republicans in 12 out of 15 districts is an affront to the Constitution and to the people who yearn for responsible, effective governance. Democracy itself is on the line \- and the State Legislature must abide by the law of the land, put an end to partisan hackery, and deliver districts that properly represent the people and communities of Ohio. Yesterday’s decision offers a glimmer of hope that our institutions will safeguard the will of the people , as the founders intended. body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40728391/325653253/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmJiM2U3Yi00ZTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymhel8-_dO8tPKk15bU9HwIdnf3WbsPWgsrz1A5gjlE=&emci=5b6a0e46-8d75-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=2bbb3e7b-4e76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

Election year is finally here, and we're staying busy on Team Seth!

Seth kicked off the year by announcing a new school construction bond to extend and expand his school construction program in Rhode Island. We also released Seth's Economic Development and Small Business Plan to rebuild our economy and support small businesses.

Seth proves every day that he has the experience, bold vision, and concrete plans to build a Rhode Island where everyone has a shot at the American Dream. The following months will be critical to showing Rhode Island voters why we need Seth to be our next governor, and we need your help.

[**The primary is now just months away, and what we do now will make all the difference on Election Day. Will you chip in what you can before our mid-month deadline tonight to support Seth's campaign for governor?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40728392/325653254/1504133259?refcode=em22_220115_MM2_fnd_gq_act___KN_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220115_MM2_fnd_gq_act___KN_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmJiM2U3Yi00ZTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymhel8-_dO8tPKk15bU9HwIdnf3WbsPWgsrz1A5gjlE=)

Seth is the leader we need to put Rhode Island on the strongest path forward. Now it's our job to keep up the momentum and ensure we have the resources to build a winning campaign this year.

Staying on track with our fundraising goals is especially important in a race as competitive as ours, so we're counting on your support.

[**Please consider chipping in what you can before midnight tonight to help us elect Seth the next governor of Rhode Island >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40728394/325653256/1504133259?refcode=em22_220115_MM2_fnd_gq_act___KN_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220115_MM2_fnd_gq_act___KN_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmJiM2U3Yi00ZTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymhel8-_dO8tPKk15bU9HwIdnf3WbsPWgsrz1A5gjlE=)

Thank you,

Katie Nee
Team Seth

name: Great America Update
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6753%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2XS%2bocdOny3r3PSrjNgYKA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69622%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bfQq9FT81QbsDnGTrbx7ug&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69623%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J4viFiAT611OyWqz3DA5Ww&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69624%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i9CaUH5XTOVdGRcobMilVg&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

clean_body: The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ The Federalist Papers ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of “The Federalist Papers” today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

body:
Trying to keep pace and keep up the strongest fight possible.
#
Peter,
We’re trying to make sure that we hit our fundraising goals this month so Pramila can keep up the strongest fight possible to deliver for the people. While Pramila redoubles her fight for voting rights, abortion rights, Build Back Better, canceling student debt, and much more, we need 100 grassroots contributions today to keep up our fundraising.
**Can you be one of those 100 donors today, Peter?**
[**→ Yes, and I can give $3 to Pramila’s fight for bold, transformative change.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9857?refcode=em20220115-963&t=1&akid=963%2E420207%2EqTk7wc)
[**→ Yes, and I can give $20.22 (it’s an election year!)**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9857?refcode=em20220115-963&t=2&akid=963%2E420207%2EqTk7wc)
**[Chip in](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9857?refcode=em20220115-963&t=3&akid=963%2E420207%2EqTk7wc)**
2022 will be full of critical legislative and electoral fights. Pramila will continue the fight for us in Congress, and has big plans to expand our progressive coalition in this midterm year. But that means we can't afford to lose our momentum in fundraising.
We know how much we can do together, as a grassroots movement against corporate influence. Let’s keep this fight going.
Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress

clean_body: If I win, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend and expand our Senate majority | | | = I know you’ve heard from me a lot, friend,but I had to reach out as soon as I saw that I'm falling $8,110 short of tonight's mid-month fundraising goal. = In a race this close – with expanding Senate control riding on Florida – I simply cannot afford to fall short. Polling has me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, and CNN analysts say Florida is one of the states most likely to flip blue. If I win, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend and expand our Senate majority, which is why national Republicans have already poured $10 MILLION into on-the-ground organizing to stop me from flipping Florida blue in November. Experts say my biggest barrier to winning is resources. Every dollar will matter in my race because Florida's last Senate race was decided by less than one percentage point. So I'm worried that if I don't hit my grassroots fundraising goal tonight, I won't have the resources I need to surge ahead. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Chief Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support.
