name: Self Reliance Central
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlm8pb3ovdacvkrtrtlarpkov5f7cheo8rnhb0ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9geao74c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zre63th0ustkhtdqccb2gh124eona17se7i45p8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9geao74c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrhf7ot52l2h5v8q9fq5dtj15n81m5964sbget08_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c9geao74c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

subject: There’s just a few more hours, Peter

body:
Republicans only need to flip ONE seat.
#
Peter,
**This is going to be a short email but that doesn’t mean you can’t have a big impact on 2022:**
We set a $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal because polling is showing there is no such thing as a safe seat in 2022. With so much left to do, starting with passing strong voting rights protections to safeguard our democracy, we need to defend and expand our majority. But Republicans only need to flip _**one**_ seat to win back the Senate majority.
**[Right now, we’re only $2,302 short of reaching our goal. With your help, we can ensure that Democrats have the resources they need to win in 2022. Rush in $5 or whatever you can spare. Talk soon,

name: =?utf-8?B?TWFyw61hIEVsdmlyYSBTYWxhemFyLCBtZSAoMik=?=
subject: FW: The first deadline of 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
We have to start the election year on the right foot.
| Peter,
---
If we want to retire Nancy Pelosi this November, then we MUST hit every single one of our fundraising benchmarks.
---
**But the January mid-month deadline is TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M., and we still need to raise $6,430 to stay on budget.**
---
_This is the first fundraising deadline of the election year, and coming up short would be a major setback as we fight to defend my seat from Nancy Pelosi’s $131 million war chest._
---

Hello, We reached out last weekend about Senator Maggie Hassan’s 2022 Founding Donor Program. Your membership status associated with dpwillis67@gmail.com is _incomplete_. **[Please click here to make a $5 donation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40729371/325657871/-1281091919?refcode=e20220115_membership&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTU0ZGNhOS01Nzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jD8xGk6Nzm6HRrNEk7NSVLVZAdradL2eWeeyGUPGfnc=) This donation will confirm your membership in our 2022 Founding Donor Program, and the funds will go directly toward Senator Hassan’s reelection efforts. ** Here is why your 2022 membership is so critical:
* New Hampshire is a swing state — the GOP sees this seat as a top opportunity to elect another far-right Trump Republican.

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Tell the Senate to pass the Freedom to Vote Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
This legislation would protect and expand the right to vote.
#

Friends -
The Senate is set to vote on the Freedom to Vote Act very soon.
This legislation would protect and expand the right to vote. The bill would make Election Day a national holiday, help get dark money out of politics, and protect early voting and voting by mail from Republican attacks.
But Republicans are once again weaponizing the filibuster to stage an all-out assault on our rights.
We must demand Senate Democrats use every tool available to get the Freedom to Vote Act across the finish line.
**[Add your name to tell Senate Democrats to pass the Freedom to Vote Act today — even if they must eliminate the filibuster to do it.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/360?t=1&akid=263%2E357359%2E-FvAIw)
We need as many people as possible demanding the Senate pass this bill.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/360?t=2&akid=263%2E357359%2E-FvAIw)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=263%2E357359%2E-FvAIw). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=263%2E357359%2E-FvAIw). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=263_357359_-FvAIw&akid=263%2E357359%2E-FvAIw) today to help us make history.

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Donaldjtrump.com Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 |

| Team, later today, **Donald Trump** is going to _host his first campaign rally of this election cycle._ He’s going to say some crazy things, and it’s going to fire up the AZ GOP.

name: Jordan
subject: quick question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hello! My name is Jordan over at Republican HQ. I have a quick question that I was hoping to get your opinion on. [**Right now my data is incomplete -- could you spare ten seconds to answer this one question?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59260225:JR_J8vENd:m:1:3253819041:DFDA10101EFDC7F045ACE5F6B290F08E:r)
As I'm sure you've heard, my favorite President -- Donald J. Trump -- is launching a brand new social media app. I'm so excited to sign up! But when I was combing through the thousands of Patriots who pledged to join, **I was disappointed to see your name not on our official list ...**
I know you're busy but could you do me a favor and respond in the next 10 minutes? _I promise to not bug you again! So will you join?_
**[Yes: I Stand With Trump >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59260225:JR_J8vENd:m:1:3253819041:DFDA10101EFDC7F045ACE5F6B290F08E:r)**
**[No: I Don 't Support Trump >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59260225:JR_J8vENd:m:1:3253819041:DFDA10101EFDC7F045ACE5F6B290F08E:r)**
President Trump is building his very own platform to stop Big Tech from controlling what we can and can't see... censoring strong Conservative voices... and blacklisting content they don't agree with.... _And the Liberals are desperate to stop him._
**Thousands have already signed a petition to BAN his app from the Apple and Google app stores -- they 'll do ANYTHING to stop him.**
President Trump needs to know we have his back.
[**So would you join? I 'll be on the lookout for your answer in 10 minutes from now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59260225:JR_J8vENd:m:1:3253819041:DFDA10101EFDC7F045ACE5F6B290F08E:r)
Thanks for all you do.
\-- Jordan
_Republican HQ (From The GOP Whip Office)_

Since 2020, Republican state legislators have introduced over 400 bills restricting voting rights. Dozens have already become law. The Freedom to Vote Act will fight back, stopping states from suppressing the vote. It’s already passed the House along with the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer is canceling a planned recess right now to debate it. We need Democrats in the Senate to keep their promises to defend democracy and do whatever it takes to make it law. **Melanie D’Arrigo’s running for Congress to end voter suppression, gerrymandering, and dark money. Can you take action today?** ******[Stand with Melanie and tell the Senate: pass the Freedom to Vote Act and protect our democracy!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mLVVkvgw2KVaQwMiJOf_uvW5kyvrh6DW8x3MDNnldnpFxsZn1JnyMNl7oXADyhDH7u8myaXNO9hmpJjeTsvGX8IBU9NHndbaU3qokjqV3KlLqcc2XpTaH3aJEyazYsMw4sF7m_sMImi-PcpwfEJfN9RIeWfneW99CJsepJxzFikSBlJ1PTK8_laD8ESMjtjfiS3MzKvXQAhtDorGMbkQej6XUvSU3VY01kPIXOJ5s1pkqlCKtpCg37IHKFFYyvWQJgHjmCSBx75QJ4k8X0HKgDdPcv8iP8IPdACHwY9XlRPotvZjeQbulJXiMvK5bF5dfRIdnI_u44lOnbvGIdvLcvl4r7MklErVYGgRLPlEXVK2ucD6owhIkNiU5Zrr8vzNDdSkmd_vHryb9PA6LMjYBmXVrh_JtPJPSqVVxoAzLrTtk0STBDDnXCdV4sSIThSQflhZLEszmxXGHDGu2chn3JCQ4OcsmXWhKZy3wLeVKbBSyE_9GiA6A6nbmNWXDJxJT0GILp6w8XGmq2QvI5TzP2XMYyp45OYoYymedRp25dxX7vKog-c9pQKNabSJY5v3-7Lm-Otw5Y9LoUtwogkifBnuUwkjAQ1RWJPtoCEDkLBxzfBT0a70YV8E4RVrZ8cz0xi139qqSkO0C9SFDKmlqODVVN-mVltYQKR9zaIUJSLk/3iq/onPvr6kHRC2Bqz5P6kxQ8Q/h1/RxpfV2V-U_LIxalSRhz-IgcxJBoVRgOQNJ2u8kNp6wc)** The Freedom to Vote Act sets national standards to
* expand opportunities to vote,
* ban partisan and racial gerrymandering,
* prevent partisan election sabotage,
* ensure that our government works for us by ending the use of dark money, and;
* reduce the influence of special interest money in politics.

**We’ve already witnessed the dangers of voter suppression and partisan sabotage of our elections. Join Melanie D’Arrigo and take action to protect our right to vote today.**

body:
I'm proud of my legislation to help workers across the country.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40729704/325660344/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDc5MWQzZi01Zjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZSmq-dg1ZMFddykGUYMuOSs-tOZZktQp-a3YMirIOs=)

Peter, thanks to your incredible support, my legislation to establish a four-day workweek is continuing to gain momentum.

**Lawmakers have lined up to support my bill and now, even private companies are starting to implement 4-day workweeks on their own.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40729706/325660345/301334478?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220115_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDc5MWQzZi01Zjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZSmq-dg1ZMFddykGUYMuOSs-tOZZktQp-a3YMirIOs=) Case study after case study shows a four-day workweek improves morale, satisfaction, AND productivity.

[**But Peter, if I lose this seat, my four-day workweek legislation will go down the drain. I need your help: Can I count on you to chip in $3 to help me stay in Congress and fight for a four-day workweek? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40729707/325660347/301334478?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220115_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDc5MWQzZi01Zjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZSmq-dg1ZMFddykGUYMuOSs-tOZZktQp-a3YMirIOs=) | [$3,000 NEEDED: CHIP IN $3 FOR A 4-DAY WORKWEEK »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40729708/325660348/301334478?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&refcode=MTFC_20220115_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDc5MWQzZi01Zjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZSmq-dg1ZMFddykGUYMuOSs-tOZZktQp-a3YMirIOs=)

Look, MAGA Republicans are doing EVERYTHING they can to unseat me and steal away our House majority.

If they succeed, ALL our progressive legislation goes down the drain – including a four-day workweek. _**That’s because MAGA Republicans couldn’t care less about working Americans.**_

Fellow Republican,
We are only halfway through the first month of 2022, and things are already starting to get serious.

The Dems have kicked off the year with strong fundraising numbers, and our great state is at risk. It is crucial we meet _**every fundraising goal**_ this year, and January is a critical indicator for our fate in 2022.

_**We need to stand with Governor Reeves as he tries to deliver a historic win this year - eliminating the state income tax.**_

We cannot allow the radical liberals to infiltrate Mississippi. Our mid-month benchmark is approaching, and we **_must_** stay on track if we’re going to win this fight and take back the house.

Please contribute to our mid-month push to keep the radical libs out of Mississippi!
[**Help us Keep Mississippi RED!**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=b3e0ac784e114f3a929ab55fb6cb46d4&_e=Ac_3pWTE1LWzQ16Ji3V_t56GA-8oG4Si81yPQ5y2r_kzNHYtSPep2DejkSHd9QHSGeYyeQXmgC8rGWfBucGOkCrl_YVw1qVaDMzafXVZIDPRNqS0zJOR0tFNAMo-jNxKcWhffkQnlCBwE3q45nfLxc61qkFvvOiVhBtFQ5G2lQL6CXsdaI5JXpcGB0FyldMPBUD3YthmQF9OMWxSBDk9dhS9qLHlEPwxAD1HGr8CUhQZjOMOEzNKQZ2TIUhH4ZF2Ki_vudPXokjw1TfG8miarQ2togEVOnDkQJYgaNu_BWscXchF4Xx2xyW_kZNXRDx73OUWqPr9Dq0RVtqrKeFxmrao230DrtlGp4UV_oSzukm6mZkvONdTTuWVr5PsK0izqBmMpeYtt1yse4YKYmwKFQ%3D%3D)

subject: Josh Mandel: a TRUE Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:

| | **BREAKING:
DONALD TRUMP HOLDING A RALLY TONIGHT
TO KEEP ARIZONA RED**
---
_**Friend, we need the resources to combat Trump's lies – but we're still $7,018 short of our goal and Trump takes the stage in a matter of HOURS!**_
---
**[Donate $5 or more now to flip battleground Arizona blue and defeat Trumpism once and for all!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730004/325662618/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk390-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDk0OWRmMS01Zjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L9IWPD0evyyzLIHd9k809hnziV791NW9eONe1zzi9aw=)**

Friend, the 2020 election is long over. Donald Trump lost, Democrats won. But not everyone is able to let go – and it could spell BAD news for Arizona:
**Donald Trump is coming to Arizona RIGHT NOW to hold a rally with his base of extremist supporters, attack our most fundamental voting rights and keep this battleground red.**
It was disturbing enough when the Arizona GOP welcomed QAnon conspiracy theorists Marjorie Taylor Greene and Matt Gaetz to defend the shameful election audit. It's clear now that GOP "leaders" like Doug Ducey and my opponent Kari Lake aren't focused on what actual Arizonans need. They'd rather push baseless conspiracy theories with Donald Trump and help him dismantle democracy as we know it.

**With so much at stake, we CANNOT hand our state's future over to Trump and his base.** **The only way to stop Trumpism from running rampant across Arizona is by kicking his supporters out of power and electing a Democratic governor.**
And that's exactly what I'm stepping up to do. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that we can win – but reports say that Republicans are getting ready to spend BIG to defeat us and keep this battleground red. **And at this critical moment, we're falling short of the resources we need to fight back and win this race.**
**[I won't be watching Trump's dangerous, desperate rally. I'll be with members of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s family at a rally in _defense_ of voting rights. But I will be keeping an eye on our goal and counting on you to help us hit it in time. So please – DON'T let Trump get away with using Arizona as a launching pad for his next anti-democracy attack. Donate $5 or more RIGHT NOW to defeat GOP extremism and defend voting rights!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730005/325662619/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk390-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDk0OWRmMS01Zjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L9IWPD0evyyzLIHd9k809hnziV791NW9eONe1zzi9aw=)**

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Stand with striking workers at Jon Donaire Desserts in Santa Fe Springs
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Earlier this week, I joined Sen. Bernie Sanders and 5 of our Senate colleagues in a letter calling on Rich Products Corp. to negotiate in good faith and come to a fair contract agreement with striking workers at the Jon Donaire Desserts plant in Santa Fe Springs, California.
#

Hi team,
Earlier this week, I joined Sen. Bernie Sanders and 5 of our Senate colleagues in a letter calling on Rich Products Corp. to negotiate in good faith and come to a fair contract agreement with striking workers at the Jon Donaire Desserts plant in Santa Fe Springs, California.
I’ll explain more about the letter and the struggle these workers are facing in just a minute, but if you can, please use this link to contribute directly to the strike fund:
[**https://www.gofundme.com/f/official-jon-donaire-strikers-gofundme-page**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/263?t=1&akid=582%2E159979%2EM1TX_-)
Ok, here’s the deal:
The 100+ striking BCTGM union workers at the Jon Donaire Desserts plant in Santa Fe Springs, California make cakes and other desserts for Baskin Robbins, Safeway and Cold Stone Creamery.
This is extremely difficult work, and the workers (75% of whom are Latina women) are often forced to work up to 16 hours of mandatory overtime with the line moving at unreasonable speeds, and with only 3 sick days per year.
Many of them are paid barely more than the California minimum wage, even though they’ve worked for the company for years.
All the workers are asking for is a $1 per hour wage increase each year for 3 years, respect on the job, a fair attendance policy and no cuts to their healthcare benefits.
But despite the fact that Rich Products Co. is a very profitable company, and despite the fact that their Chairman, Bob Rich Jr., has an estimated net worth of $7.5 billion, management is refusing to negotiate in good faith.
It takes an incredible amount of courage to go on strike, and these workers need our support to keep it up. If you can, [**please use this link to make a contribution directly to support striking workers at Jon Donaire Desserts in Santa Fe Springs, California.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/263?t=2&akid=582%2E159979%2EM1TX_-)
Here in California, like all across the country, workers are standing up and standing together to fight for a better future. Thank you for having their back today.
In solidarity,
Alex Padilla
**[DONATE TO THE STRIKE FUND](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/263?t=3&akid=582%2E159979%2EM1TX_-)**
P.S. [**Read the full letter Sen. Sanders, my colleagues and I sent to Rich Products Corporation**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/325?t=4&akid=582%2E159979%2EM1TX_-) calling on them to negotiate in good faith and treat their workers with the respect and dignity they’ve earned and deserve.

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=582%2E159979%2EM1TX_-)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We've got to keep showing up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We’re not going to win this campaign from home.
I organized a call with our campaign leadership last week to discuss our travel over the next month. We discussed whether we need to pull down our events and meetings for the next couple of weeks, in an abundance of caution.
I thought about it. And then I said:
**Find a way to keep me on the road. We’re not going to win this campaign from home.**
So I write this to you from Dallas, where we are prioritizing keeping our team and those with whom we work and meet along the way safe. We’re masking, we’re vaccinated and boosted and we’re testing.
But we’re also hustling — meeting with small business owners, local elected leaders and prospective volunteers. Bringing everyone we can find into this campaign.
We’re in this to win. And winning in Texas means traveling to meet the voters who will decide the outcome of this critically important election. **[If you're with us, please consider chipping in anything today to help keep our campaign on the road.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51689?refcode=ema20220115-171629&t=1&akid=171629%2E444211%2EhPhlWT)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51689?refcode=ema20220115-171629&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=171629%2E444211%2EhPhlWT)**
After gathering with supporters tonight in Dallas, I will be back on the road, driving south to hold similar meetings in Coastal communities over the weekend.
I’ll continue to share our message about the great things we can do when we bring Texans together, like creating better jobs, investing in world class public schools and expanding Medicaid so more folks can see a doctor. And I’ll make sure that people also know that the way to achieve these goals is to take the fight to the one man who’s preventing us from achieving our potential, Greg Abbott.
I can’t phone that in. I’ve got to be there, in person, to get it done.
**[I hope you’ll help keep me on the road with a donation of $3 or more today. It’s the right way to run and it’s the only way to win.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51689?refcode=ema20220115-171629&t=21&akid=171629%2E444211%2EhPhlWT)**
I’m grateful for your help. I couldn’t do this without you.
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220115-171629-footer&t=22&refcode2=171629_444211_hPhlWT&akid=171629%2E444211%2EhPhlWT)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=171629%2E444211%2EhPhlWT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=171629%2E444211%2EhPhlWT)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

subject: I only have one goal this year: defeating Gov. DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
is that your goal too? |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730071/325666258/232719733?refcode=20220115_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM2ZmE1Ni02MTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCuOuWLR5HDYJqjiZinVtmR0Yw2Welxz-jag0-Boy5g=)

Friend,

As we gear up for election season, I only have one goal: **defeating Gov. Ron DeSantis. If that’s your goal too, please take a moment and contribute -- any amount you can -- to my campaign for governor. We only have a _few hours_ to reach our $20,000 mid-month goal, so please pitch in. **

I've said it before and I'll say it again: _Beating Gov. DeSantis won’t be a walk in the park._ He’s got an army of right-wing, billionaire donors, and they’ve already proven they’re willing to shell out big bucks to keep him in power.

However, Gov. DeSantis needs their help because he’s _losing_ momentum. Polls have shown we’re either closing in on him or flat-out beating him, and that’s all thanks to folks like you.

Like me, you know that the only way we’ll beat Gov. DeSantis is by building the largest grassroots movement Florida has ever seen, and I’m proud to say _**that movement has begun.**_

**[So, as we move full steam ahead towards November, please join me in the fight to defeat Gov. DeSantis and make a quick donation to help our efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730072/325666259/232719733?refcode=20220115_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM2ZmE1Ni02MTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCuOuWLR5HDYJqjiZinVtmR0Yw2Welxz-jag0-Boy5g=)**

If that’s your goal too, please take a moment and contribute -- any amount you can -- to my campaign for governor. We only have a few hours to reach our $20,000 mid-month goal, so please pitch in. I've said it before and I'll say it again: Beating Gov. DeSantis won’t be a walk in the park. He’s got an army of right-wing, billionaire donors, and they’ve already proven they’re willing to shell out big bucks to keep him in power. However, Gov. DeSantis needs their help because he’s losing momentum. Polls have shown we’re either closing in on him or flat-out beating him, and that’s all thanks to folks like you. Like me, you know that the only way we’ll beat Gov. DeSantis is by building the largest grassroots movement Florida has ever seen, and I’m proud to say that movement has begun. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = God bless, Charlie Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Peter, this is my final message before tonight’s must‐hit deadline.

With the Election Year underway, I know your inbox is flooded with requests — _mine is too._

**But believe me when I say our campaign is more urgent than any other.**

Gov. Newsom announced our closely‐watched Special Election will be held on April 5th, so we have _less than three months_ to meet our ultimate goal — replace Devin Nunes with a Democrat who will fight for our district’s values, not blindly follow orders from Trump.

Nunes clones in this Special Election are relying on dark money to defeat me. But Peter, I don’t take a CENT of dirty corporate donations. [**That’s why I’m coming to you with a simple request: Can I count on you to chip in $3 to elect me in California’s Special Election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730155/325670156/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220115_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGUxMjU3MC02Mzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCDccaDVT5YiVh29WG6iPYLUEhCDg2F8uXIMmI5Sezk=) | [179 GRASSROOTS DEMOCRATS NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: CHIP IN $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730156/325670157/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220115_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGUxMjU3MC02Mzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCDccaDVT5YiVh29WG6iPYLUEhCDg2F8uXIMmI5Sezk=)

clean_body: our campaign is more urgent than any other | = Peter, this is my final message before tonight’s must‐hit deadline. With the Election Year underway, I know your inbox is flooded with requests — mine is too. But believe me when I say our campaign is more urgent than any other. Gov. Newsom announced our closely‐watched Special Election will be held on April 5th, so we have less than three months to meet our ultimate goal — replace Devin Nunes with a Democrat who will fight for our district’s values, not blindly follow orders from Trump. Nunes clones in this Special Election are relying on dark money to defeat me. But Peter, I don’t take a CENT of dirty corporate donations. = | = Peter, I wouldn’t come to you with an ask like this unless it was serious. But my team told me we’re just 179 donations away from hitting our $30,000 mid‐month goal. This is our first deadline of the year, and if we miss it, that’ll set us back in this race. I refuse to give up momentum to a Devin Nunes clone who won’t fight for my neighbors in CA-22. I don’t enjoy asking you for your hard‐earned money, Peter, but I have nowhere else to turn. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Grateful for your support, Phil | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to keep this open seat red with Devin Nunes stepping down. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat them. Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us replace the worst MAGA Republican in Congress, make a=. If you'd like to connect with us, you can visit our Facebook , our Twitter , and our Instagram . to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

subject: We changed Richmond, let’s change Washington!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

Today, Virginia turns over a new leaf and swears in new leadership to turn the Commonwealth around. My sincerest congratulations to Glenn Youngkin, Winsome Sears, and Jason Miyares, who represent a new era of common sense governance returning to Virginia.

Glenn Youngkin will repeal the gas tax hike and eliminate the regressive taxes on groceries. Jason Miyares will enforce the rule of law and reform our broken parole board. Winsome will play a pivotal role as a key vote in passible legislation bringing us closer to restoring our majority in the state Senate.

We have taken back Virginia, in 2022 we will take back Congress!

Locally, we have seen a need for reform. Where soft on crime Commonwealth Attorneys have failed parents and citizens, Jason Miyares will ensure we keep our families safe.

Where woke schools have pushed an agenda in the classroom, Glenn Youngkin will get back to teaching kids how to think, not what to think.

I am proud to stand with them.

Jennifer Wexton has failed to put safety and parents first and remained silent on the scandals that our Republican ticket took on.

The 10th district deserves better than Jennifer Wexton’s inaction. Those concerned about the safety of our children deserve better, and hardworking Virginians deserve better than her pushing higher utility bills and taxes on our families.

We unseated the radicals who had taken over Richmond, and next year we will take back Congress and defeat Jennifer Wexton.

But I need your help.

subject: Trump took over the GOP (here’s what he’ll do with it in November 😨)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Team, Donald Trump was a nightmare president – especially between his 2020 loss and Biden’s inauguration.
Even more frightening is his total control of today’s GOP. Trump’s endorsements are worth more to the right than anyone else’s – and he will use that to his advantage in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_011522_4]
DASS has a $25,000 goal for tomorrow’s midnight deadline to help us to keep Trump’s hand-picked Secretary of State candidates out of office. Rush $20 RIGHT NOW and ensure we win this fight!! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_011522_4]
If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express,
your donation will process immediately:
RUSH $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=email_011522_4]
RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=email_011522_4]
RUSH $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email_011522_4]
RUSH $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email_011522_4]
Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?refcode=email_011522_4&amount=5]

name: Val Demings
subject: This email is a bit different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I hope you'll keep reading
| | |
---
Friend: I am coming up on my first big fundraising deadline of the election year – and in a race as competitive as this, it couldn't be more important to get off to the strongest possible start.
I'm sure your inbox is filled with emails right now, but **this isn't the typical kind of fundraising message you might expect, so I hope you'll keep reading. What I'm about to tell you is why I decided to run, and it's important. **
When I'm in the middle of make-or-break moments like tonight for my Senate race, my mind often goes back to Jacksonville – back to the tiny house I grew up in with six brothers and sisters. Things weren't always easy. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and although we didn't have a lot of money, we had each other.
In fact, it was Mom who used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val." This inspired me to get into public service, and ever since, growing tired of doing what's right has never been an option. From my time as a social worker to my time as police chief to my time as a representative in Congress, I've held this mantra close to my heart.
**_Never tire, _I remind myself, as experts say my race in Florida is one of Democrats' best opportunities to protect and expand our Senate majority.**

**_Never tire_ , I repeat, as polls show me statistically tied with my extremist opponent.

_Never tire_ , I say, as I head into yet another major fundraising deadline thousands of dollars behind where I need to be.**
The fact of the matter is that a 50-50 Senate isn't working for you or our country. So my promise to you is this: **I will _never tire_ in this work to expand our majority and secure a future for voting rights, reproductive freedom and all our shared values.**
**[I ask a lot of you because I have so much faith that you'll never tire _, _either. You know the stakes of this election, so before my most important fundraising deadline of the election year thus far, will you chip in $5 or more right now? Every dollar will help me defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730516/325682210/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2055-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjI4MWQ1MC02ODc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLEX47ZFdrSqSd4tM1uwzTQbNERzRT30tF9Ok23KUZ0=)**
I can't tell you how much it means to have you with me on this journey. Thank you for all you do.

Val Demings
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730517/325682211/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2055-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjI4MWQ1MC02ODc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLEX47ZFdrSqSd4tM1uwzTQbNERzRT30tF9Ok23KUZ0=)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730518/325682212/1804727444?refcode=jtk2055-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjI4MWQ1MC02ODc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLEX47ZFdrSqSd4tM1uwzTQbNERzRT30tF9Ok23KUZ0=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730519/325682213/1804727444?refcode=jtk2055-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjI4MWQ1MC02ODc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLEX47ZFdrSqSd4tM1uwzTQbNERzRT30tF9Ok23KUZ0=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40730520/325682214/-460395862?refcode=jtk2055-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjI4MWQ1MC02ODc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLEX47ZFdrSqSd4tM1uwzTQbNERzRT30tF9Ok23KUZ0=&emci=4d5df2ba-4d75-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=46281d50-6876-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

| Team, have you seen this?

**We made history in 2020.** We flipped a U.S. Senate seat and turned Arizona blue in the Presidential race for the first time since 1996. Arizona played a major role in electing Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.

But we are not stopping there. We are going to continue to build on all the hard-fought progress we’ve made.

The Arizona Democratic Party is your party -- and it should feel like it.

**[We all need to raise our voices and show what’s important to Arizonans. body:
We need your help!
Derek,
The chances that Republicans take back the U.S. Senate in 2022 are high! [**We know Hassan is vulnerable.** **But to defeat the Democrat establishment in New Hampshire we need your help! **](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/1/0100017e5f68525e-94680d1e-9759-4014-a9d7-31879f837988-000000/4SBvTd3xB5IvtTmnSfMa_lB4djU=253)

This upcoming Senate race will be one of the most watched in the country. [**Which is why we need every single Granite Stater to step up and do their part. **](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/2/0100017e5f68525e-94680d1e-9759-4014-a9d7-31879f837988-000000/s0ER4qCEuzmRAPQKEpvMfVKhq6k=253)

[**I hope you consider making a donation today. Republicans have a huge opportunity for success in the upcoming midterm elections, and we want YOU to be a part of this historic opportunity!**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/3/0100017e5f68525e-94680d1e-9759-4014-a9d7-31879f837988-000000/dROp5IB7wgz1ADuiUNJvAj7uLsU=253)

name: !! Urgent Democracy Alert
subject: Ten. Five. Four.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
Our democracy hangs on these three numbers.

|
---

| | [Team, it’s officially 2022, and _our very democracy_ is on the line in the upcoming November midterms.

**The stakes boil down to these numbers: Ten. Five. Four.**

**TEN** \-- that’s the number of people who were _involved with rallies connected to the January 6 insurrection_ that were just ELECTED TO PUBLIC OFFICE.

**FIVE** \-- that’s the number of people connected to the insurrection who are RUNNING FOR CONGRESS.

name: Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: Can you help us get this video out to voters?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Folks,

We’ve got chills watching this video telling the story of #SleepOutRI and
Matt and Cynthia’s protest for unhoused Rhode Islanders.

We know that the people who got us into this mess — the crisis of
homelessness, the extreme storms caused by climate change, and out of
control COVID numbers — aren’t going to be the ones to get us out.

That’s why we need a whole new state government made up of leaders who
actually CARE about people. But informing voters takes resources, and we
need to fundraise in order to ensure our video reaches as many folks as
possible. So we’re asking for your help.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3476?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220115_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=383%2E43343%2EVtrb_w ]Sleep Out Video with Play Button

you chip in any amount you can so we can reach voters with this inspiring
movement message?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: Mark Kelly
subject: re: Donald Trump's rally today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
This requires a response:
| | |
---
Team — When former President Trump came to Arizona recently to hold a rally, he said, and I quote:

"Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate."
— Donald Trump
**Now Trump is back in Arizona, holding a rally TONIGHT to try to make good on those words.**

I’ve said it before, but it's worth repeating: Serving Arizonans in the Senate is an honor, and I am _determined_ to continue fighting for them — Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike.

But I need to be honest with you: Each time Trump intervenes directly in my race, it's a major boon for my opponents' fundraising and a challenge that we'll need to overcome.

That's where you come in. We’ve laid out a goal to raise $125,000 by tonight, so we can keep pace with National Republican groups trying to take Arizona's seat — and control of the Senate. **Trump's rally tonight makes this goal all the more crucial, and I’m counting on your support so we don't fall short.**

**[Will you split $5 now between our people-powered campaign and the DSCC to help us hold the Senate and meet our must-hit goal? With Trump _personally_ taking the stage in just a few hours, it's going to take a lot of people chipping in a few dollars at a time to overcome the challenges we face.](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220115-Kelly-KellySignedTrumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220115-Kelly-KellySignedTrumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=2614%2E9716520%2EdUqZCN)**
If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Mark Kelly and the DSCC. | | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=5&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220115-Kelly-KellySignedTrumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220115-Kelly-KellySignedTrumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=2614%2E9716520%2EdUqZCN)

clean_body: This requires a response: | | | Team — When former President Trump came to Arizona recently to hold a rally, he said, and I quote: "Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate." — Donald Trump Now Trump is back in Arizona, holding a rally TONIGHT to try to make good on those words. I’ve said it before, but it's worth repeating: Serving Arizonans in the Senate is an honor, and I am determined to continue fighting for them — Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. But I need to be honest with you: Each time Trump intervenes directly in my race, it's a major boon for my opponents' fundraising and a challenge that we'll need to overcome. That's where you come in. We’ve laid out a goal to raise $125,000 by tonight, so we can keep pace with National Republican groups trying to take Arizona's seat — and control of the Senate. Trump's rally tonight makes this goal all the more crucial, and I’m counting on your support so we don't fall short. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Mark Kelly and the DSCC. | | | | | It has never been more urgent for us to deliver change for Arizona, and I am so grateful to have you in my corner. Full speed ahead! — Mark Mark Kelly U.S. Senator, Arizona Former U.S. Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly is running for re-election in Arizona. Peter,

I can hardly believe it has been a year since Joe Biden and Kamala Harris took office.

What a socialist nightmare their administration and the Radical Left have been working to create.

* Critical Race Theory being forced on our kids.
* A raging crisis at the border.
* Inflation crippling everyday Americans.
* Unconstitutional mandates.

**_This is the sad reality of Joe Biden’s America._**

Joe Biden and the Radical Left just won’t stop. They are coming after our freedom in new ways every day.

You know I won’t back down. Not now, not ever. But... I can’t do it alone. _I need every single patriot to stand up and fight with me._
_
__Will you join me to fight Biden’s failing agenda by chipping in today?_[**_YES: SUPPORT SARAH NOW >> _**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=0e7e0ec300b646acab4dede567720e9e&_e=wZg-bxlOTy7UElNowzXdBfllq4AH2UgN5GasZe_wgLRQni5jpIRkjmg334-v1ME6e18fYH212nk94LXFANahfJf2HKW6F0h0MfkdX30wyqkbG1Y_p6g7C51wvTuBYtCihauCfrhLjVmJSFi-toiucaRgfJ-vBeaEokV6Gv9Mga4TtCU2Z1SEWLdqzdBs4KY5aUKhVu1rR2GzknOeca3cNPdHEOIEbIbzxwLxXY-bkZUbyc5CFGGmhedgflXzINxD_vclg_8DfpHJgeP0fgX9ddT2mAZr57WwYrWBxYlpwxbG51LG4qeySsDebVQjUnaQYq_F58eo1FYjcCWC7zo-MhOw7NsW5jtUrhvepfsefKIZaZ7o_5tA4dGhvbxJm9wsjXRtp-gt4ig1WrxUhzpBrfdbruYTSNSGt48v2c248Uk%3D)

Are you ready to hear President Trump’s message? Friend, I’m at Donald Trump’s rally where he is about to take the stage and discuss the importance of securing our border, our elections, and our nation. [**Stand with Trump!**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=4fd3929e1cd0405dba74d2d4b3532517&_e=XKogda7nTsCnaQ4peprE2FKwr-XYvgbH07b27_nAfWHf4gBj3124yec6hqO_CEH9fW3cCTchd9SqNy7ocpuMlOrxeTLIf1oLhRpjtKHGwutraDoZXsgqg2SdRA_7PA10xswpHFBsEEeFTb8IOBUQOXhvImLLnEF5mZarOHOoJ52aTROIGC5z-0lCZ3l7b28uKnLMb7RYtfGpbm2GWAwEmo-gVHaCvCnuHZAI6o-7M28FpZ99YwS52wRA-WCrKB2qFnIIJdAU3uzIBiVUfHfMYsxeTE0rLD6jd2uRngeLLM9rMnJu-Xqpa1xuWMcM032yeUtKBxt9pWL0Y_qdHk5BMQzQi_IcISmBNtP5xQYG9DXh1SYhKb0t8WtsrBZO81kn2DVeiT5pS2n1CPINNfRGxucv-cSHSjvkVXhrFNx-sTLp5Haj8aFT-Fc0di1ZanbKeGe8MoCfQIu274OUrzuVpxqUfmYO2W7sJwTdePDHqnI%3D) The energy here is unbelievable. Arizona is ready to fight for our conservative values and elect Republicans up and down the ballot! Now, it is time to turn energy into action. President Trump prioritized the border while Obama and Biden did **NOTHING**. I’ve seen the violent atrocities committed by the cartels on my own property – that’s why I’ll fight for you every day, Friend, just like Trump. I am running to be Arizona’s Attorney General because I want to be an advocate for **YOU**. I want to **FIGHT the Biden administration** on behalf of all Arizonans. **But I can’t do this by myself.** I know you are a top grassroots patriot. You understand the issues facing our state. You know the importance of ensuring that our AG’s office stays in conservative hands. That’s why I’m asking you to [**generously chip in just $10**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=4fd3929e1cd0405dba74d2d4b3532517&_e=XKogda7nTsCnaQ4peprE2FKwr-XYvgbH07b27_nAfWHf4gBj3124yec6hqO_CEH9fW3cCTchd9SqNy7ocpuMlOrxeTLIf1oLhRpjtKHGwutraDoZXsgqg2SdRA_7PA10xswpHFBsEEeFTb8IOBUQOXhvImLLnEF5mZarOHOoJ52aTROIGC5z-0lCZ3l7b28uKnLMb7RYtfGpbm2GWAwEmo-gVHaCvCnuHZAI6o-7M28FpZ99YwS52wRA-WCrKB2qoZSHavJ3sGeRKqsWIRNuDyMyeB8flOaeYf8v0nOkmPsA0DZnENof7JqQ3xEyjvUbSvwVvCw6GuYJvDRFyGe9Z0xFVhHhiXKS8n5ehjHUElqREd9HALSbPqbFaN3QyqXoCx3R7WZlo_AHAruxTWItZJw69WZJt-Tb3FMo2rVk7WzXb7CfdwR5jeynFZ8ppGR1S1fcGDtuaDiFqH8bFw7C6cSacjvMU8GoHHvv0lfPkVQ%3D) before Trump takes the stage so I can let every Arizonan know what I stand for and how I’ll fight for them as their Attorney General. name: Bruno Amato
subject: The top Republican in the House spent all of 2021 trying to stop working people from getting the help they need. That’s why we need to defeat him.

It’s like he doesn’t even care about hiding it anymore. **First** , Kevin McCarthy said he would never allow members of his party to cooperate with investigations into January 6th. **Then** , Kevin did everything he could to stop the committee from forming and even threatened to create his own committee filled with likely sympathizers of the violent mob that attempted to overthrow our government. **Now,** Kevin is saying that if the Republicans take back the House this year, he’ll remove top Democrats from their committees — and is refusing to appear before the January 6th committee after he was asked to do so. Folks, this is what authoritarianism looks like. This is what we are up against. **[**Will you make a contribution right now to our campaign before our mid-month deadline at midnight tonight and show McCarthy we won’t back down?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHZMndoPog5VbbG6xSnOqDUgubgaCs7Q9rQVi9prtPi-27Z782uRdFJ9cfdWLcWPkM1ThKu4XN0sSWH86rXREJrfjbVlbuNoancla5pTJuXKJnaSywN_RvptFmXE5R97UcEP2YryasCzzCPHpSknKUGte4UOTU-9NqKkodS6YgWP5dHB8yCdcXERyvpaYekvAcFYzD-9gmvTgwexmNnDTFNzDmYMIUUvd0QhAqDvtyFvwAqYclqF14bpuC10Cq_hJhSwpMbUYn1o4RuX17eirEUc6fQW75JZu-vMo1u2mSc1et3XaDTnT2msk9KP8yozP10Dk143S0ATZPtFuR7qOSR-_woXpCcbkIC-fniqIdG-dHlxk-b-Twg7VELmRKH54DjX3-humYO69TRbEvncpjn5W0ZG6hGDt0u04fRc7lQtDLuf-d_opjL7WOFiUuD9skhjBvYEGcWMfqLx6R1MM7jhmNCMIww928-xGlRs5M2ao6HMmkWdrGniKJeTv5eI0Vx4XaEcgx8CI9P00yOk-PFY/3iq/10aL3B4eQWegoQSTJO6X5Q/h1/Nov68fSUBkpbpdG9QEFfiCypizrBx7j4XUs5pSqaw-U)** [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHdug-zi44a6xVmnMEMr-oSBrxX-mDtnz0du-AuBbiKWHcZnzWq3cVMTk0vjlMmpcBM8LUYHN8HlMvXDZBCOs1bW0pvA6OZ7apIUcT8UXqpqpbPf0Pr5Zv2zjQhgVNYfylWTcbM6zEMmH5ZffzQ7_oEZ8-PcwL-ukyAuM5yWH7Fi-FMUNHqVVYZnLp0Y1qP23wvljqS6CAP8LtJao4xS6S3Uv7KQg7sF9WHaVHOfV9FLGryMaNaWt63faBsMaOeUDjH48v6ZTsAXZLK5vR8XjohzL1Nzm-04-zD6Wev86kZNjNn66VHNAacm9Dgj5zm-VTpc8qaP__O0kyNEPR3sJEz7oF0i3Rv08vrpLU7T2475U1zos1J7GFdU--HPeNV92DhzoSxVMWkE-kZbkZiWwU1WJkhiHP_okfKZ-YZ_jHlO6D2XGvAR-XsOHqiL_e2YkAL-G3NqSYsQdxt8B3r_bKhx-w6RSzrnYOKdZerax02esH0xD4PTfgHL645PcMjr4HpTDYN65KaUOqdYDBozh8M4/3iq/10aL3B4eQWegoQSTJO6X5Q/h2/pU7GcRgo_hSmxCLz4gdwNf8ofzcO3IAmP04aN31bx7M) I talk a lot about Kevin McCarthy in emails like this one — yes, because I’m running to become the Democratic nominee in our district to go up against him in November.
But I also talk about him because it’s important to shed light on his hypocrisy, on his lies, and on his downright failure to actually fight for the people of our district and our country.
**I’m not just running against him — I’m running for the people of the Central Valley.** ****I’m running to support our veterans. I’m running to fight for policies like Medicare For All, to take real action on climate, to end economic and racial disparities in education, to fight like hell for our unions, and so much more. It is shameful to see the ways in which he has failed us. He voted against sending payments to working families through the Childcare Tax Credit, he voted against getting relief to small businesses through the American Rescue Plan, and he voted against cleaning up our environment when he voted against the Build Back Better Act. And that’s just in the past year!
Instead of fighting for the people he’s supposed to represent, he’s fighting on behalf of the most extreme members of his party and threatening to remove top Democrats from their committees if he becomes Speaker.
[**Folks — it is about time we replaced Kevin McCarthy with someone who will fight for us. If you agree, chip in now to help us hit our mid-month goal and power our grassroots movement to defeat him.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHR2lCU2BTydpf6-ibWeQ5dyfzg1W1e1_3bwujOBhxSG9opSFw_DjBjPwADtvMtq5REaPY8Hil-3dJIcWa8s_9LMLZSljLqHbp2mFJEpZZkW0zvUi98TDzZd7Qm1buuBeOmoeY1fAQ5kxA9iqbwDFfd9pbk9THpUWT9eQ7CdeImRbEt58T-KdqbcvpXbaGY7oXvSQtpy6dmtNphlKdcUACbNexHK-Cdn72qjoQv57KdfoTnOCrSjF3MiHgQMIH-hJSzSksom6Ledtb-I5EymseZJpb8dV17OZ3LNU_sWM6Sl-x6Pp6d870m-864UkMnsxPVfGww5IfRC2VhYsu8lJRi7A3objRKvaBjTzSe5XsQKuywjTPlezdtXBBLb3gXtByGrtJVQ519iXSOEI948u9Kwaa-hDv3lDKo0_ivMXwvTw7AXwKGTGi_g4r9M2Lz_Rg3GXtrasfwRHlx1YGBYAo9u6C0PftQz6xgN7mRIHWu0DvZxWfX-d1xUC_wJP0M26W1uWtWtsIkaYGmT4MAOBr8Y/3iq/10aL3B4eQWegoQSTJO6X5Q/h3/dKqzQMXG-ahEq3RL8QC-eVP_cwTVfhO72dc761ulhMo)

**Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District.** Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. clean_body: | | | It’s like he doesn’t even care about hiding it anymore. First , Kevin McCarthy said he would never allow members of his party to cooperate with investigations into January 6th. Then , Kevin did everything he could to stop the committee from forming and even threatened to create his own committee filled with likely sympathizers of the violent mob that attempted to overthrow our government. Now, Kevin is saying that if the Republicans take back the House this year, he’ll remove top Democrats from their committees — and is refusing to appear before the January 6th committee after he was asked to do so. Folks, this is what authoritarianism looks like. This is what we are up against. I talk a lot about Kevin McCarthy in emails like this one — yes, because I’m running to become the Democratic nominee in our district to go up against him in November. But I also talk about him because it’s important to shed light on his hypocrisy, on his lies, and on his downright failure to actually fight for the people of our district and our country. I’m not just running against him — I’m running for the people of the Central Valley. **I’m running to support our veterans. I’m running to fight for policies like Medicare For All, to take real action on climate, to end economic and racial disparities in education, to fight like hell for our unions, and so much more. It is shameful to see the ways in which he has failed us. He voted against sending payments to working families through the Childcare Tax Credit, he voted against getting relief to small businesses through the American Rescue Plan, and he voted against cleaning up our environment when he voted against the Build Back Better Act. And that’s just in the past year! Instead of fighting for the people he’s supposed to represent, he’s fighting on behalf of the most extreme members of his party and threatening to remove top Democrats from their committees if he becomes Speaker. Let’s do this, Bruno | | ---|--- Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District.** Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Bill McSwain Wins Second Place in PA GOP Central Caucus Straw Poll
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-wins-second-place-in-pa-gop-central-caucus-straw-poll?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**January 15, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain Takes Strong Second Place in PA GOP Central Caucus Straw Poll
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, distinguished himself among a field of 13 represented gubernatorial candidates, clinching second place in the PA GOP Central Caucus Straw Poll. The strong showing indicates significant support among central Pennsylvanians, as well as his growing momentum across the state, with McSwain overtaking longtime Congressman and 2018 U.S. Senate nominee Lou Barletta, as well as opponents Jake Corman, Doug Mastriano, Charlie Gerow, and Scott Martin, who are all Central PA locals.

McSwain addressed a crowded room of State Committee members ahead of the vote, taking questions from attendees and sharing his vision for a stronger, safer, more secure Pennsylvania:
---
|
> **_"As Governor, I will restore freedom and law and order. I'll ensure that every child has a quality education that starts with school choice, and revive our economy by cutting taxes, reducing regulation, and reducing the size of government. I'll restore election integrity, repeal Act 77, and protect life and the Second Amendment. I will be the Governor who gets the government off your back."_**
---
|
---
| McSwain emphasized his desire to be a Governor for all 67 counties, and promised to protect the individual liberties of all Pennsylvanians. McSwain also highlighted why his history of public service and status as a conservative outsider make him the best candidate to defeat Josh Shapiro and enact the will of the people:
---
|
> **_"I am a U.S. Marine Corps infantry officer, a federal prosecutor, and a U.S. Attorney appointed by President Trump. I'm a limited government, free market, law and order, constitutional conservative. I am also a political outsider, not a career politician, and public service is in my blood. I am the conservative leader who can defeat Josh Shapiro, and the only candidate who can compete in Shapiro's back yard. Starting my first day in office, I'll prioritize promoting the will of the people by working to restore in-person voting and enacting transformative school choice legislation."_**
---
| The final straw poll results are as follows:

Dave White - 21
**Bill McSwain - 17 **
Lou Barletta - 16
Charlie Gerow- 12
Scott Martin - 12
Jake Corman - 7
Doug Mastriano - 6
Jason Richey - 4
Nche Zama - 4
Guy Ciarrocchi - 2
Melissa Hart - 2
John Ventre - 1
Mike Turzai - 0
---
|
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=c40a36443e&e=b1ec95759b)
###
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=aaaceacf51&e=b1ec95759b)
---
| | [](billmcswain.com)
---
|
---

You can [update your preferences](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=c558b7d880) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=c558b7d880).
---
